This role requires someone who can work independently, think critically, and execute without hand-holding.



What You’ll Be Doing:



• Drafting legal documents (contracts, agreements, policies)

• Creating and reviewing Terms of Use, Privacy Policies, and compliance documents

• Advising on regulatory compliance (including OMVIC and automotive industry standards)

• Structuring legal frameworks for marketplaces, SaaS platforms, and finance operations

• Reviewing business models to ensure legal protection and compliance



Requirements:



• Strong experience in Canadian law (Ontario required)

• Proven track record drafting legal documents and policies

• Ability to interpret and apply regulations to real business scenarios

• Detail-oriented and precise

• Able to work independently with minimal direction



Important:



We operate fast and expect clear, actionable legal work — not theory.



No training will be provided.



To Apply:



Send:



• Summary of relevant experience

• Examples of legal work (policies, contracts, etc.)

• Your availability and turnaround time

title: Senior Financial Analyst
description:
Who is Bare?

Bare is one of Australia’s fastest growing businesses, in one of the most traditional industries in the world — the funeral industry.

We exist to make end-of-life care accessible, affordable and transparent, changing the way Australians deal with death. For too long, the industry has delivered expensive, traditional, cookie-cutter services that don’t reflect how modern Australians want to say goodbye.

By combining empathy with technology, we’re creating end-of-life experiences that are simple, personalised and affordable. In just five years, we’ve supported more than 40,000 families, become Australia’s most awarded end-of-life provider (recognised for customer service, innovation and digital disruption), and built a team of 100+ passionate people.

And we’re just getting started.

As part of our continued growth, we’re looking for a Senior Financial Analyst to join our finance team.



So, what’s the role?

-This is not your typical Senior Financial Analyst role. You’ll work closely with our VP Finance and senior leadership team, helping to drive financial insight and discipline across one of Australia’s fastest growing companies.

-You’ll play a key role in financial analysis, reporting, forecasting and business partnering, turning financial data into meaningful insights that support smart commercial decisions.

-This is a hands-on role in a fast-paced, high-growth environment, ideal for someone who enjoys digging into the numbers, improving processes, and influencing business decisions.



You’ll be responsible for:

-Preparing monthly financial reports, dashboards and P&L analysis, including clear variance commentary

-Supporting the budgeting and forecasting processes across multiple entities

-Building and maintaining financial models to support planning and decision-making

-Providing financial insights and analysis to support senior leadership and operational teams

-Partnering with State Leads and department heads to monitor performance and improve margins

-Assisting with reconciliations and financial data accuracy across systems

-Supporting compliance with BAS, PAYGW, FBT and other regulatory requirements

-Assisting with audit preparation and working with external auditors

-Identifying opportunities to improve financial processes and reporting efficiency

-Supporting the implementation of automation, AI tools and improved reporting frameworks



What will set you apart from other candidates:

-You’re analytical and commercially minded, able to turn data into meaningful insights

-You enjoy solving problems and improving processes

-You’re comfortable working in fast-paced, high-growth environments

-You’re highly organised and able to manage multiple priorities

-You take ownership and initiative, proactively identifying opportunities for improvement

-You’re curious and interested in leveraging technology and automation in finance



What you’ll bring:

-A Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance or a related field

-CPA, CA or CMA qualification (or working towards) highly regarded

-4–6+ years’ experience in financial analysis, reporting or accounting

-Strong experience with financial reporting, forecasting and variance analysis

-Advanced Excel / financial modelling skills

-Experience with Xero or similar accounting systems

-Strong communication skills and the ability to present financial insights clearly to non-finance stakeholders



What’s in it for you?

This isn’t your ordinary finance role, in your ordinary company. You’ll join an entrepreneurial, inclusive culture where we succeed together. We offer autonomy, flexibility and real ownership. No two days are the same — and that’s exactly how we like it.



In addition, we offer:

-Strong opportunities for career growth and progression

-A high-performing and highly engaged team environment

-Autonomy and flexibility, including work-from-home options

-A competitive remuneration package

-The opportunity to help transform an industry and make a real human impact



The main reason you’ll join, however, is because you believe in what we’re building. You’re excited by growth. You want to help scale a business that is genuinely changing lives — and you want your finance expertise to be part of that journey.



Please include your resume in your application.

title: Financial Accountant - AU Company
description:
Who is Bare?

Bare is the new way to funeral. We are a holistic end of life care provider, allowing our families to grieve in their own way, at their own pace, knowing their loved one is cared for by a team who truly understand their needs.



By combining empathy with technology, we’re creating end-of-life experiences that are simple, personalized and affordable. In only five years, we’ve served more than 30,000 families, have become Australia’s most awarded end-of-life provider (with awards in customer service, innovation and digital disruption), and have built a team of more than 100 people committed to changing the way Australians deal with end-of-life. And we’re just getting started.



We’re looking for a passionate and detail-oriented Financial Accountant to join our high-performing remote team. If you're a proactive finance professional who thrives on ownership, continuous improvement, and meaningful work, we’d love to meet you.



What You’ll Be Doing

As our Financial Accountant, you’ll be a key player in ensuring accurate, insightful, and timely financial reporting. You’ll collaborate across teams, drive process improvement, and uphold the financial integrity of our mission.



Key Responsibilities:

-Own the Month-End Close

Lead all aspects of EOM: journal entries, reconciliations, accruals, and financial statement prep.

-Deliver Insightful Reporting

Produce monthly and quarterly management reports, including variance and trend analysis.

-Ensure Regulatory Compliance

Prepare BAS, IAS, and statutory filings, ensuring alignment with AASB and tax standards.

-Champion Continuous Improvement

Streamline workflows, introduce automation, and enhance internal controls.

-Collaborate Cross-Functionally

Partner with Marketing, Operations, and other non-finance teams to align on budget and strategy.

-Support Strategic Projects

Get involved in cost analysis, ERP upgrades, and special projects that shape our financial future.



Why Join Bare?

Make a Meaningful Impact: Your work directly supports families during one of the most vulnerable times of their lives.

Remote-First Flexibility: Work from anywhere in Australia with the tools and autonomy to succeed.

Mission-Driven Culture: Join a team that leads with empathy and integrity—where your voice matters.

Growth & Innovation: Help shape scalable systems in a business that's growing fast and disrupting the norm.



About You

You’re not just technically sharp, you bring heart and high standards to everything you do. You thrive in fast-paced environments and care about doing work that matters.



Must-Haves:

-Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or similar.

-CPA/CA qualification (or in-progress).

-2–3+ years' experience in financial accounting, ideally in service-led sectors.

-Familiarity with Australian accounting standards, BAS/IAS, and financial reporting.

-Understanding of various accounting standards relevant to Bare and consolidations of many entities.

-Attention to detail and excellent reconciliation skills

-Strong ERP (MYOB, Xero, SAP) and Excel skills.

-Strong Excel/Sheets skills and automation of manual processes in your mindset-DNA



Nice-to-Haves:

• Experience in mission-driven sectors (healthcare, aged care, funeral services).

• Adaptability in high-growth or high-volume environments.

• Resilient, working with little or no supervision.

• Experience of managing international teams, interaction with multi-entity organizations, and experience within companies with a minimum annual revenue of $50 million.

• Handle ambiguity, competing priorities, and strict deadlines. Create and implement scalable processes, including training. Integrate AI and automation.



Core Values We Look For

• Empathy: You care deeply about people—colleagues and customers alike.

• Accountability: You take ownership and deliver results with pride.

• Clarity: You communicate financial information in a clear, human way.

• Curiosity: You’re always looking for a better way and love solving problems.



Perks & Benefits

-Fully remote work setup with flexible hours

-Purpose-driven work with real human impact

-Growth and learning opportunities in a scale-up environment

-Supportive, inclusive team culture



Please include your resume when submitting your application. Thank you!

title: TikTok Paid Advertising Specialist — Beauty & eCommerce
description:
TikTok Paid Advertising Specialist — Beauty & eCommerce

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Type: Full-Time

Level: Mid–Senior

Daily Rate: ?2,500 – ?3,000



About the Role

Hair Doctors is a fast-growing Australian haircare brand launching our eCommerce store across two product ranges, a clinical hair supplement line and a Korean-formulated haircare range. 



We are building our TikTok presence from the ground up and want a specialist who has done this before, not someone learning on the job with our budget.



We are not looking for a social media manager who also does paid ads. We are looking for a performance-focused TikTok advertising specialist who understands how to turn content into sales, someone who knows how brands like Bondi Boost built exponential revenue through TikTok by combining organic credibility with paid amplification.



If you have run TikTok ad campaigns for a beauty, haircare, skincare, or consumer health brand, know how to identify winning creative before spending significant budget, and understand the full funnel from Spark Ad to Shopify checkout, this role is built for you.



Core Accountabilities

Campaign Strategy & Management

- Develop and manage our TikTok paid advertising strategy end-to-end: campaign structure, audience targeting, budget allocation, and bidding strategy

- Build and manage campaigns across all relevant TikTok ad formats: Spark Ads, In-Feed Ads, Video Shopping Ads, and Catalog campaigns

- Structure campaigns correctly from the start, awareness, consideration, and conversion objectives in the right sequence

Manage our TikTok Ads Manager account daily, monitoring performance, adjusting bids, pausing underperformers, and scaling winners

- Coordinate TikTok pixel and Events API setup with the Shopify team to ensure accurate attribution and tracking



Spark Ads Core Responsibility



- Guide our in house content creators to make well performing organic TikTok content. 

- Identify organic content from our brand account and from creator posts that has the right signals to be amplified as a Spark Ad

- Manage the Spark Code authorization process with creators, brief them correctly, obtain codes, and pull their posts into Ads Manager

- Understand what makes a Spark Ad perform versus a standard In-Feed Ad and apply that knowledge to creative selection

Build a Spark Ads pipeline, always have the next two to three pieces of content ready to test as existing ads fatigue

- Monitor Spark Ad performance at the creative level: completion rate, engagement rate, click-through rate, cost per purchase and brief creators on what is working



Creative Strategy & Briefing

- Define what creative works on TikTok for haircare and beauty products: hooks, formats, lengths, calls to action — based on platform knowledge and data

- Brief UGC creators and micro-influencers on exactly what to film: hook, key message, product demonstration, and call to action without over-scripting and killing authenticity

- Identify winning creative frameworks: before and after, routine integration, hair transformation, product unboxing, doctor-backed credibility and build a testing matrix around them

- Review creator content before it is posted and provide specific feedback aligned to TikTok best practice

- Understand the difference between content that performs organically and content that performs as a paid ad, these are not always the same

- Work with the broader team to ensure landing pages match the creative promise of the ad



Performance & Optimisation

- Set up correct campaign tracking: TikTok Pixel, Events API, and UTM parameters in coordination with the Shopify operations team

- Report weekly on key performance metrics: ROAS, CPM, CPC, CTR, cost per purchase, and video completion rate

- Run structured creative tests: test one variable at a time, gather sufficient data before calling a winner, and document learnings

- Monitor for creative fatigue and proactively refresh content before performance drops significantly

- Build a retargeting strategy: warm audiences who have viewed content, visited the store, or added to cart but not purchased

- Scale winning campaigns intelligently: know how to increase budget without killing performance



Creator & Community Coordination

- Identify and vet micro-influencers in the haircare, beauty, and wellness space who are a genuine fit for our brand

- Manage outreach, seeding, and Spark Code coordination with creators

- Build and maintain a database of creators: performance history, content quality, audience demographics, and engagement rates

- Coordinate creator relationships in a way that generates a consistent pipeline of authentic content





Who You Are



- Has run TikTok paid advertising campaigns specifically for a beauty, haircare, skincare, or consumer health eCommerce brand. This is the core requirement

- Understands the TikTok algorithm and how paid amplification interacts with organic performance

- Knows what creative works for product-based brands on TikTok. You can look at a video and tell within seconds whether it will perform or not

- Has experience with Spark Ads specifically, not just awareness of them, but has set them up, managed authorization codes, and optimized them

- Has managed a Shopify-connected TikTok campaign, understands how the pixel works, how the product catalogue integrates, and how to read attribution data

- Data-driven: you make decisions based on numbers, not feelings or aesthetic preference

- Proactive and self-directed:  you identify problems and opportunities without being asked

- Strong written English for creator briefs, reporting, and async team communication

- 3–5 years of TikTok advertising experience at a hands-on level

- Prior experience working with Australian, US, or UK clients strongly preferred





Platform & Technical Skills (Non-Negotiable)

TikTok Ads Manager

- Fully proficient in TikTok Ads Manager:  campaign creation, ad group structure, targeting, bidding, and budget management

- Has set up and managed Spark Ads campaigns. Understands the authorization process, code management, and how Spark Ads differ from standard In-Feed

- Has set up Video Shopping Ads and Catalog campaigns connected to a Shopify product feed

- Understands TikTok's campaign objectives and when to use each: Reach, Traffic, Video Views, Community Interaction,  Product Sales

- Knows how to structure a full-funnel TikTok campaign — awareness at the top, retargeting in the middle, conversion at the bottom



Tracking & Attribution

- Has installed and validated the TikTok Pixel on a Shopify store

- Understands TikTok Events API and why server-side tracking matters for attribution accuracy post-iOS14

- Can set up and validate standard events — View Content, Add to Cart, Initiate Checkout, Purchase

- Understands UTM parameter structure and how to use them to track TikTok traffic in Google Analytics or Shopify analytics

- Can read attribution data critically. Understands the difference between last-click, view-through, and blended attribution



Creative Assessment

- Can analyze a TikTok video and identify its hook, message structure, and call to action

- Understands why the first two to three seconds of a TikTok ad determine whether it lives or dies

- Knows which creative formats perform for beauty and haircare: transformation, routine, before and after, testimonial, creator reaction, educational

- Can write a creative brief that gives a creator enough direction to produce high-performing content without killing their natural voice



Shopify Integration

- Has connected a TikTok Ads account to a Shopify store via the TikTok Sales Channel app

- Understands how the product catalogue syncs and how to troubleshoot catalogue errors

- Has run Video Shopping Ads using a Shopify product catalogue

- Can coordinate with a Shopify operations team on pixel validation and event mapping





Industry Knowledge (Important)

- Understands the haircare and beauty category on TikTok: key creators, content trends, and what drives purchase intent in this space

- Has studied or worked on campaigns similar to Bondi Boost's TikTok growth strategy. Knows how organic content, Spark Ads, and Video Shopping Ads work together

- Understands the consumer journey for a beauty product purchased through TikTok,  from first view to purchase, and can build a campaign strategy around it

- Aware of TikTok content guidelines and advertising policies for health, beauty, and supplement products, knows what claims can and cannot be made in paid content





Bonus (Not Required)

- Experience managing TikTok Shop in addition to external Shopify campaigns

- Experience running campaigns for a supplement or consumer health brand

- Experience coordinating micro-influencer seeding programmes alongside paid campaigns

- Klaviyo or
 marketing knowledge to understand how TikTok acquisition feeds into retention





How to Apply

Applications without demonstrated TikTok advertising experience for a product-based brand will not be progressed.

Please include:



A specific TikTok campaign you ran for a beauty, haircare, or consumer product brand — what the brief was, what you built, the creative approach, and the results including ROAS, CPM, and cost per purchase if available

Your experience with Spark Ads specifically — how you identified content to amplify, how you managed the authorisation process, and what performance looked like

Your view on what makes creative work on TikTok for a haircare brand — what formats, hooks, and calls to action drive the best results

How you structure a TikTok campaign from scratch for a new eCommerce brand with no existing audience

Your desired daily rate in PHP and your availability

Any TikTok Blueprint certifications or relevant credentials

description:

We are a fast-growing beauty brand and academy committed to excellence, efficiency, and innovation. From luxury services to streamlined digital training, we move fast—and we need someone who can keep up and help us scale even faster.

? Highly tech-savvy

? Reliable with strong written English

title: Recruiting Specialist
description:
This is for a full time remote position with a US-based retail merchandising company that has been in business for over 25 years, with over 15,000 employees in the field. This is a fully remote position working within the Corporate HR/Recruiting Department. Working hours are US Central time. Must have reliable wifi and computer at home to perform this role. Must be very comfortable speaking on the phone with US Candidates. 



We are proud to offer benefits for this role including PTO, Floating Holidays, Computer Allowance, Health Care Stipend, and 13th Month Pay.



Essential Duties

Ensure a continuous flow of merchandiser applicants on a national level to handle

routine spikes in field merchandising recruitment by utilizing web-based recruitment

resources

Review applications and conduct phone screen interviews for variable hour field

merchandising staff with applicants to determine their suitability for placement

Maintain department workflow tracking procedures and participate in active

communication with the Recruiting Team, Recruiting Supervisor, and Human Resources

Manager

Achieve and maintain a minimum average of 7 candidates screened and submitted for

consideration per working day, with an average of 60% of those submitted completing an

electronic intake process, equating to 21 candidates completing intake per 5 day week

Other duties as assigned



Must demonstrate effectiveness in the following areas:

o Outstanding English communication and interpersonal skills 

o Excellent time management and organizational skills

title: Turn Telegram Contacts into $5,000/Month: DeFi Protocol Needs BD Now
description:
Job Description:

We’re a DeFi protocol launching game-changing LP bond technology. We need Business Development partners who can introduce us to crypto launchpads, blockchain projects, and DeFi communities.





THE OPPORTUNITY:

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.





COMPENSATION:

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.



Additional Commission: 

- 25% commission on ALL upgrade fees from your partnerships

- Level 2 upgrades: $40 upgrade fee, you get $10 each

- Level 3 upgrades: $80 upgrade fee, you get $20 each

- Level 4 upgrades: $160 upgrade fee, you get $40 each



-  $500 bonus when your partnerships hit 25 Level 4 bonds

-  $2,000 bonus at 100 Level 4 bonds

-  $5,000 bonus at 300 Level 4 bonds

-  Realistic month 1 earnings: $2,000-5,000

- Total 90-day potential: $20,000+



YOU HAVE:

- Existing connections in crypto (launchpads, DAOs, blockchain projects)

-
/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

- Understanding of DeFi/crypto space

- Hunger to earn based on results, not hours





YOU DON’T NEED:

- To close deals (I handle that)

- Any upfront investment

- Previous BD experience (connections matter more)

- Full-time commitment (work your own schedule)





THE ROLE:

Simply introduce me to decision-makers at crypto projects. I close the deals, you collect commissions. Every user from your partnerships who upgrades their bonds puts money in your pocket..

Example: ONE medium-sized launchpad partnership generating 100 L4 bonds = $8,000 for you.



Ready to turn your crypto connections into serious income?



Apply with:

- List 3-5 crypto projects/launchpads you have connections with

- Your
 handle

- Brief description of your crypto involvement



We need partners who see the opportunity and want to run with it. Start earning within days of your first successful introduction!

title: URGENT HIRING: Virtual Assistant - Administrator, IT and Accounting Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting
description:
You only get one chance: carefully follow these instructions before applying or you will not hear from us. To apply you must visit our webpage 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/



Company: Health and Life



Location: Remote (with own internet and office facilities)



Job Type: Contract (may go long term depending on performance)



About Us:

Health and Life Access is a well-established healthcare consulting Chartered Accounting firm organisation specialising in the management of service entities and organizations throughout Australia and overseas. We are committed to creating a sustainable and socially responsible healthcare system.



Job Description:

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant to provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to our organisation and clients. The successful candidate will report to the CEO and relevant supervisors, ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of our business.



Key Responsibilities:

Provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to the CEO and other consultants/managers.

Maintain accurate records, perform bookkeeping, and handle client billing.

Assist with financial reporting, budgeting, and petty cash management.

Manage calendars, appointments, and correspondence.

Develop and maintain effective working relationships with staff, clients, and suppliers.

Identify and resolve problems promptly, providing potential solutions.

Participate in special projects and additional duties as required.



Requirements:

Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting experience preferred.

Proven experience in administration, IT, and accounting.

Proficiency in using Google Suite, Xero, FileMaker Pro, and other software as specified.

Strong organisational and communication skills.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Commitment to maintaining confidentiality and adhering to ethical standards.

Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple tasks efficiently.



Working Conditions:

Standard 38-hour week, Monday to Friday, 8:30 am to 5:00 pm ACDT.

Flexible working hours may be required.

Must have own internet and office facilities.

No leave entitlement applies

All tasks are allocated by a Google calendar. The more you complete competently and within budget, the more work you generate.



Fees:

Task-based monthly fees up to $3,000 AUD or equivalent overseas currency. Long term contract positions available based on performance.



Fees reviewed based on performance; potential for multiple fee increases for good performance.



How to Apply:

If you are a motivated and detail-oriented individual with a passion for healthcare administration.



To apply visit our ”Undergraduate up to senior accountant jobs” web page 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/.



Attention to detail matters, so read the application process carefully. You only get one chance.

title: Overnight Recruitment and Scheduling Specialist Remote | Freelance
description:
We are looking for a highly organized, reliable, and proactive freelancer to join our team in an overnight role supporting our recruitment operation.



This position plays an important part in helping qualified candidates move through the hiring process efficiently. You will be responsible for candidate outreach, pre screening, follow up, interview coordination, and keeping activity organized across active hiring campaigns.



We are looking for someone who is confident communicating with candidates, detail oriented, able to work independently, and comfortable keeping multiple moving parts on track in a fast paced remote environment.



What this role involves



Reaching out to candidates through calls, texts, and online messages



Reviewing candidate information and identifying who may be a fit based on role requirements



Pre screening candidates for qualifications, communication, location, licensing, and overall alignment



Scheduling interviews based on client availability



Following up with candidates to confirm attendance and keep the process moving



Updating notes and candidate activity accurately in our systems



Communicating clearly with the internal team regarding candidate status, scheduling updates, and follow up needs



Helping ensure campaigns stay active, organized, and moving forward overnight



What we are looking for



Previous experience in recruitment, sourcing, interview scheduling, appointment setting, or candidate coordination is strongly preferred



Strong written and verbal English communication skills



Professional, friendly, and confident communication style



Strong attention to detail and ability to stay organized

title: Marketing Manager
description:
PropZap — Building the Future of Real Estate in North America



PropZap is building a next-generation real estate platform designed to expand across North America.

We are pioneers in how modern real estate companies should be built — powered by strong systems, smart technology, data-driven decision-making, and operational efficiency.



We're building with intention.

With structure.

With technology at the core.

With performance that compounds over time.



Our goal is to create a brand that sets the standard. A company that leads. A platform built to scale intelligently and sustainably across markets.



And for the right person, this isn't just a job inside that company.

It's a front-row seat to its growth.



--------------------------------------------------------------

Role: Marketing Manager

Location: Remote

Shift: Aligned with Canada MST

Role Type: Part-time

Compensation: To Be Discussed



We believe great people build great companies. If you can truly take ownership of growth and deliver measurable results, we are willing to offer premium compensation. Strong operators who scale performance will be rewarded at the top end of the market.



--------------------------------------------------------------

Why This Role Is a Big Opportunity for You



Most marketing roles box you in. You manage a small piece. You follow someone else's strategy. You deliver results and someone else gets the credit. This is not that.



At PropZap, you work directly with founders. Your ideas get implemented. Your results directly drive the company's growth — and your career compounds with it.



As we expand across markets, your scope grows. Your influence grows. Your compensation grows.



This role has a clear path toward Head of Marketing for someone who wants to build long term — not just manage campaigns quarter to quarter.



This is a ground-floor opportunity inside a company built to scale. The people who join early and perform will be rewarded at the top end of the market.



You'll be building something that compounds — and your career compounds with it.



--------------------------------------------------------------

What You'll Be Doing



Meta Ads Leadership (Most Critical)

- Manage and scale large-budget Meta Ads campaigns

- Architect structured campaign systems designed for scale

- Plan creative angles, hooks, and positioning

- Write high-converting direct-response ad copy

- Produce ad creatives (graphics/video)

- Execute disciplined A/B testing

- Optimize based on cost per qualified lead and full-funnel performance



Landing Page Optimization (Squarespace)

- Optimize and improve our existing landing page (
)

- Increase conversion rates through structured experimentation

- Strengthen messaging clarity and calls-to-action

- Ensure tracking accuracy and clean data flow



 Marketing & Lead Management (HubSpot)

- Build and refine nurture sequences

- Segment and organize new and existing leads

- Implement clean tagging systems

- Improve engagement and conversion rates

- Ensure seamless handoff of qualified leads



Social Media (Brand Presence)

- Maintain a consistent, professional presence across Instagram,
, and LinkedIn

- Post regularly to support credibility and trust for leads coming through paid ads

- Content does not need to be complex — clean, on-brand, and consistent is the goal



Analytics, Tracking & Attribution

- Implement advanced tracking systems (Pixel, CAPI, UTM strategy)

- Maintain clear attribution from click to handoff

- Analyze full-funnel performance

- Identify bottlenecks and recommend improvements

- Document A/B tests and build repeatable optimization frameworks



Marketing Innovation & Leadership

- Proactively suggest growth ideas

- Stay updated on new tools, platforms, and strategies

- Serve as the internal expert for performance marketing

- Guide leadership decisions with data-backed insights



--------------------------------------------------------------

Who This Is Perfect For

- This role is ideal for someone who wants stability with upside.

- Someone who wants to stop freelancing unpredictably and build something consistent.

- Someone who enjoys ownership and wants their work to matter.



Proven hands-on experience managing significant Meta Ads budgets

- Strong understanding of direct-response marketing

- Comfortable with analytics and attribution

- Strong copywriting and creative strategy skills

- Structured and disciplined with testing



Highly Ideal:

- Real estate marketing experience

- Experience generating buyer or seller leads

- Experience promoting brokerages



Bonus If You Have:

- SEO experience

- Google Ads experience

- AI tools and automation knowledge

- Zapier or workflow automation experience



--------------------------------------------------------------

What You'll Gain

- Premium compensation aligned with performance

- Long-term stability inside a scaling company

- Direct collaboration with founders

- Real ownership and influence over strategy

- Clear path toward leadership

- The ability to grow as the company grows



Imagine being two or three years into a company that has expanded across multiple markets — and knowing you helped build the engine that powered that expansion.



That's the opportunity here.

We're building something designed to grow.

If you want your career to grow with it, we'd love to meet you.



--------------------------------------------------------------

How to Apply



Send the following to: 



- Resume (required)

- Portfolio (required)

- Case studies or performance summaries of Meta campaigns (required)

- Summary of budgets managed (required)

- Intro video (preferred)

- Expected monthly compensation (required)

- Internet speed test link (required)

- Any DISC test result (if available)



Subject Line: Marketing Manager – Your Name



--------------------------------------------------------------

If you're ready to stop hopping and start building something that scales — this might be the role you've been waiting for.

title: PPC Ad Specialist (Google Ads + Local Service Ads)
description:
PPC Ad Specialist (Google Ads + Local Service Ads)

Company: LIFT Auto Repair Marketing

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Type: Full-time

Salary: $2,000 USD/month

Schedule: Monday through Friday, US business hours 9am to 5pm (MST)



About LIFT

LIFT is a US-based digital marketing agency that works exclusively with auto repair shops. We manage Google Ads and Local Service Ads (LSA) campaigns for 130+ shops across the United States. Our PPC team is small, tight-knit, and fully remote. We move fast, communicate clearly, and take ownership of our work.



This is a good opportunity to join a growing team and expand your skills and scale paid PPC media for our clients. You won't be a cog; you'll be a core part of the operation.



The Role



You'll be a hands-on PPC specialist managing a portfolio of auto repair shop advertising accounts. This is not a "set it and forget it" role. You'll be in accounts multiple times per week, optimizing campaigns, reviewing lead quality, adjusting budgets, and building new campaigns from scratch during client onboarding.



You'll work alongside 4 other PPC specialists and report directly to the Head of PPC.



What You'll Actually Be Doing



Campaign Management (Daily/Weekly):

- Monitor and adjust campaign budgets to keep spend on pace with monthly targets

- Proactively identify opportunities to increase budgets based on client goals and performance data

- Review search terms and add negatives to eliminate wasted spend (solid grasp of negative keyword strategy and match types is expected)

- Listen to and review call recordings and transcripts for lead quality

- Check conversion tracking and flag/fix any issues

- Run performance health checks on CPA, CTR, CVR, and CPC

- Review and act on Google's optimization recommendations (only the ones that actually help)

- Test new ad copy variations every 60 days

- Manage geographic and ad scheduling targeting based on performance data

- Log all activity for every account you touch



Account Onboarding (As Assigned):

- Build new Google Ads campaigns from scratch using LIFT's structured templates

- Set up Local Service Ads (LSA) accounts including profile configuration, service categories, and job types

- Configure WhatConverts call tracking for new accounts

- Set up budget pacing in AdPulse

- Process insurance document reviews for LSA verification

- Complete cross-pod QA reviews on other specialists' builds before go-live



Landing Page Awareness:

- Understand how landing pages influence Google Ads performance (quality score, conversion rate, bounce rate)

- QA landing pages during onboarding to flag broken elements, missing tracking, or content issues before campaigns go live

- Coordinate with the LP designer on fixes that impact ad performance



Escalation and Support:

- Respond to account questions (relayed from clients) from Account Managers via ClickUp tasks

- Troubleshoot account suspensions, billing issues, and policy violations

- Coordinate with Google/LSA Support when needed

- Flag issues early; never let a problem sit



What We're Looking For



Required:

- 2+ years hands-on experience managing Google Ads campaigns (Search required; Display/YouTube are a plus but not necessary)

- Familiarity with Google Local Service Ads (LSA)

- Solid understanding of conversion tracking (Google Tag Manager, Google Analytics 4)

- Comfortable working in Google Sheets (formulas, data manipulation)

- Strong English communication (written). You'll be commenting on tasks, responding to Account Managers, and documenting your work daily.

- Reliable working internet connection and a quiet workspace

- Full-time schedule availability

- Ability to follow detailed, step-by-step processes without cutting corners

- Self-motivated. You'll work independently most of the day. If you need constant supervision, this isn't the right fit.

- Google Ads Search certification



Nice to Have:

- Experience with call tracking platforms (WhatConverts, CallRail)

- Experience with PPC budget pacing tools (AdPulse or similar)

- Understanding of how landing pages impact ad performance, including A/B testing concepts

- Experience in an agency environment managing multiple client accounts simultaneously

- Familiarity with ClickUp or similar project management tools



Tools You'll Use:

- Google Ads (daily)

- Google Local Service Ads dashboard (daily)

- ClickUp (task management, daily)

- Slack (team communication, daily)

- WhatConverts (call tracking)

- AdPulse (budget pacing)

- Google Sheets (reporting, data)

- Google Tag Manager / GA4 (tracking setup)

- Bitwarden (credential management)



How You Can Succeed Here

- You take ownership. If something is wrong, you fix it or escalate it. You don't wait to be asked.

- You communicate proactively. If a task is blocked, you say so immediately with what you need to unblock it.

- You follow the process. We have structured templates and checklists for a reason. Cutting steps creates problems downstream.

- You're responsive on Slack during working hours. We don't expect instant replies to everything, but going dark for hours without notice is a problem.

- You manage your time well. You'll have 25-35 accounts in your portfolio. You need to prioritize without being told which one to work on next.

- You spot opportunities, not just problems. If a client's campaigns are performing well and there's room to scale, you flag it.



Compensation:

$2,000 USD/month. Full-time position. Paid monthly. 13th month pay included.



How to Apply



IMPORTANT: Start your application message with the word "LIFT PPC Specialist Application" so we know you've actually read this entire post.



Please include in your application:

- Your relevant Google Ads experience (how many accounts, what industries, how long)

- Whether you have experience with Local Service Ads specifically

- Your English proficiency level (conversational, professional, native/bilingual)

- Your available working hours in Philippine time

- A brief description of a campaign optimization you made that improved results (what was the problem, what did you do, what happened)



We review every application. If your experience matches, we'll schedule a short video interview followed by a practical skills assessment.

title: Live Chat Sales Agent
description:
Location: 100% Remote

Schedule: Flexible shifts, days and nights

Hours: Full-time, 8 hours per day, 6 to 7 days per week

Pay: $5.00/hr starting pay plus bonuses and commission, with top performers reaching $10.00/hr



The Role

We are growing and need sharp, personable communicators to join our chat team. In this position, you will represent online businesses in live customer conversations, your goal being to build genuine connections, keep people engaged, and close sales through natural and compelling conversation. This is not a cold calling job or a rigid script-reading exercise. We want people who actually enjoy talking to others and have a knack for guiding a conversation toward a result.



Day to Day Responsibilities

Once you complete training, you will handle several live chats at once, typically between 3 and 8 at a time. You will get to know customers, understand what they are looking for, and introduce them to products and services in a way that feels helpful rather than forced. Reaching your daily and weekly sales goals will be central to the role, and sticking to team standards and guidelines is non-negotiable.



You Are a Good Fit If You Have



A natural, fluid writing style in English that does not sound robotic or stiff (this will be tested)

Strong typing speed and accuracy (also tested)

Sales confidence and the ability to close without being aggressive

A sharp eye for reading between the lines, picking up on tone and emotion through text

A reliable computer, fast internet, and a distraction-free place to work

A grounded, professional, and discreet attitude toward the work





What You Get

Weekly payments sent through Wise or Payoneer, full training before you go live, and continuous support from the team as you develop. Your hourly rate is not fixed, it goes up as your numbers improve. Performers who stay consistent and put in the effort earn well above the base. This is a stable role with genuine long-term potential for the right person.



Applying

Send us a short message covering the following:



What makes you well suited for chat-based sales work

Your relevant background and experience

A short description of who you are as a person, plus a CV if you have one



One final note: If your English is not at a high, conversational level or you are not confident in your ability to carry engaging and natural written conversations, please do not apply. We respect your time and ask that you respect ours. Applications that do not meet the requirements will NOT move forward!

title: Lead Web Developer - Remote (Australian Company)
description:
Position Title: Lead Web Developer

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full-time (38–40 hours per week, aligned to Melbourne, Australia business hours)

Reports To: Agency Director



ABOUT THE ROLE



A growing Melbourne-based digital marketing agency is looking for a full-time Lead Web Developer to join their team remotely from the Philippines. The agency delivers end-to-end digital solutions for clients across multiple industries — from strategy and design through to custom web development, deployment, and ongoing support.



You will lead the technical build of web projects from scoping and wireframing through to deployment and handover. This is a hands-on senior role — you will be building websites yourself, not just overseeing others. You will work closely with the agency's design team, copywriters, and business development managers, and will participate in client-facing technical consultations including scoping, quoting, and presenting solutions.



This is a long-term, stable position with genuine growth potential. The agency is expanding its development capability and the right person will have the opportunity to shape the technical direction and grow into a technical lead role.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING



Client Engagement and Technical Scoping (Pre-Build)

- Participate in client discovery calls and technical consultations alongside senior tea
mbers

- Assist in scoping, estimating, and quoting web development projects

- Create wireframes and collaborate with designers to translate concepts into buildable specifications

- Prepare technical proposals and explain solutions to non-technical clients



Web Development (Core)

- Build custom WordPress websites from the ground up — themes, plugins, and bespoke functionality

- Develop modern web applications using React JS, JavaScript, and related frameworks (Gatsby JS, Next JS)

- Build and maintain headless CMS architectures and multi-site CMS environments

- Write clean, maintainable CSS and ensure responsive mobile views across all projects

- Handle content migration between platforms and CMS environments

- Set up project scaffolding, configure build pipelines, and manage deployments via Netlify and GitHub

- Manage version control using Git and GitHub — branching, pull requests, and code reviews



Digital Design Support

- Work within Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, and Canva to interpret design files and translate them into code

- Collaborate with the design team on mockups and prototypes, providing technical feedback on feasibility and performance



Project Management

- Manage your own workload and project timelines using Zoho Projects

- Communicate progress, blockers, and updates clearly via Slack and

- Coordinate with designers, copywriters, and BDMs to deliver projects on time and to specification



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



Essential

- Minimum 3 years of hands-on web development experience, preferably in an agency environment managing multiple client projects simultaneously

- Strong custom WordPress development skills — theme development, custom plugins, and advanced customisation (not just page builders)

- Proficiency in JavaScript and React JS, with working experience in at least one of: Gatsby JS, Next JS, or similar modern frameworks

- Experience with headless CMS architectures and decoupled front-end/back-end builds

- Solid CSS skills including responsive design, CSS Grid, Flexbox, and cross-browser compatibility

- Comfortable with Git/GitHub workflows — branching, merging, pull requests, and collaborative version control

- Experience deploying and managing sites via Netlify or similar JAMstack hosting platforms

- Ability to interpret design files from Figma and Adobe Creative Suite and translate them accurately into code

- Experience participating in client-facing technical discussions — scoping, quoting, and explaining solutions

- Strong written English — you will be writing technical proposals, project updates, and client communications

- Self-motivated and able to manage your own workload without constant supervision

- Reliable internet connection and a dedicated, professional home workspace



Desirable (Good to Have)

- Experience with multi-site WordPress management

- Familiarity with PHP for WordPress backend customisation

- Knowledge of web performance optimisation, SEO best practices, and accessibility standards

- Experience with AI-assisted development tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Cursor, ChatGPT) and integrating AI-powered features or APIs into web projects

- Experience with project management tools such as Zoho Projects, Asana, or similar

- Exposure to e-commerce platforms (WooCommerce, Shopify)

- Understanding of CI/CD pipelines and automated testing

- Basic graphic design capability — enough to create or adjust assets when needed



ATTITUDE AND ATTRIBUTES



- Builder, not just a coder: You take ownership of projects from wireframe to deployment and care about the end result, not just the code

- Technical communicator: You can explain technical concepts, timelines, and trade-offs to non-technical clients and tea
mbers in plain language

- Detail-oriented: You catch bugs before they reach production, match designs pixel-for-pixel, and take pride in clean, well-structured code

- Self-starter: You don't wait to be told what to do. You identify what needs to happen and you do it

- Collaborative: You work well with designers, copywriters, and account managers — you understand that great websites are a team effort

- Curious and current: You stay across framework updates, new tools, and web development best practices



WORK ENVIRONMENT



- Full-time remote position (Monday to Friday)

- Work hours aligned to Melbourne, Australia business hours

- Communication via Slack,
, and video calls

- Regular interaction with the agency director, design team, and project managers

- You will be working across multiple client projects simultaneously



WHAT WE OFFER



- Competitive salary with long-term financial stability — this is a permanent, full-time role with consistent income you can build your future on

- Long-term, stable full-time role with a growing agency

- Genuine opportunity to shape the agency's technical direction and grow into a technical lead role

- Diverse client portfolio — exposure to multiple industries and project types

- Supportive team environment with in-house designers, copywriters, and BDMs

- Clear career development path for the right candidate



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered for this role, your application must include all of the following. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be progressed.



1. Your resume (PDF format preferred) and a portfolio or links to websites you have built or contributed to.

2. A brief introduction (3–5 sentences): Tell us who you are, where you are based, and why this role interests you.

3. Development experience summary (1 paragraph): Describe a web project you built from start to finish. What was the brief, what technologies did you use, and what was the outcome?

4. Technical proficiency: List the development tools, frameworks, and platforms you use regularly and rate your proficiency in each (beginner / intermediate / advanced). Include at minimum: WordPress, JavaScript, React JS, Git/GitHub, and CSS.

5. Your work setup: Please provide a photo of your workspace, a screenshot of your internet speed test (use speedtest.net), and your computer specifications (screenshot or typed).

6. Availability: Confirm that you are available for full-time work (38–40 hours per week) aligned to Melbourne business hours and that this would be your sole employment.

7. Answer these questions:

   - How many years have you been working in web development?

   - Have you worked for an Australian or international client before? If yes, briefly describe the arrangement.

   - What is your current living situation? (e.g., Do you live alone, with family, support dependents?)

   - What does a stable, long-term role mean to you personally?

title: AI Video Editor (Longform)
description:
Mission



Turn Data Engineer Academy’s recordings into bingeable, high-retention YouTube videos that attract aspiring data engineers and drive leads for Data Engineer Academy.



You are responsible for turning raw footage into finished longform videos that hit our performance benchmarks on watch time, click-through, and subscriber growth. We run like a media machine with clear checklists, fast feedback, and constant iteration. 





What You’ll Own



Editing & Post-Production



Take 1–3 raw recordings per week and turn them into polished longform YouTube videos (10–60 minutes each).

Cut A-roll and integrate B-roll, screen recordings, graphics, and on-screen text to keep retention high.

Clean audio, basic color correction, and final export / upload-ready files.

Create 2–4 alternate hooks/intros per video when needed (for testing).



Story & Pacing



Apply our scripting / structure framework to make complex data topics simple and engaging.

Tighten pacing: remove fluff, kill dead spots, and front-load value.

Add pattern interrupts (zoom, crop, b-roll, text, callouts) to improve retention.



Collaboration & Systems - Work closely with the Creative Director on:



Titles, thumbnails, and description direction (you don’t own them, but your input matters).

Reviewing retention graphs and iterating edits based on data.

Maintain organized project files, templates, and presets so other editors can plug into your system. 



Success Looks Like



Within 90 days, for our longform uploads you’re editing:



Consistent publishing: 2+ longform videos per week.

Per-video in first 7 days:

Average view duration: 40–50%+ of video length.

Clear, tight storytelling and pacing (no rambling, no awkward cuts).

Internal feedback: “I can record and walk away. The edits make me look sharper, not more robotic.”



Requirements



Experience



3–5+ years professional video editing, with at least 1–2 years focused on YouTube longform.

Portfolio that includes:

Education / expert / talking-head style channels, preferably in tech, business, or education.

Videos with 10K+ views each where you owned the edit.



Skills/Traits



Strong sense of pacing, narrative, and visual clarity.

Comfortable editing screen shares, code walkthroughs, and slide content without making it boring.

Basic motion graphics and on-screen text for clarity (not over-designed).

Able to follow SOPs, checklists, and naming conventions without hand-holding. 

Fast, reliable executor; you hit deadlines without sacrificing quality.

Coachable: you can take direct feedback and apply it quickly.

Obsessed with YouTube; you watch channels in our space and steal what works.

You care about the result (views, watch time, leads), not just “pretty edits.”

Bonus if you have worked with an edtech company

title: Virtual Assistant – Full Training Provided
description:
!!!Applications that do not include all required items in the “How to Apply” section will not be reviewed. We value attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions—key traits for this role. If any part of this application is incomplete or missing, your submission will be automatically disregarded.?



About us:



Majestix Collection is a premier destination for buying, selling, and trading luxury timepieces. We curate an exceptional selection of watches for collectors around the world, driven by a commitment to authenticity, transparency, and unparalleled client service.



We are a growing company looking for a Virtual Assistant who is eager to grow, takes ownership, and follows instructions carefully. We provide full training on:



Sales and marketing

Customer service and admin tasks

Product listings and e-commerce support

Photo and video editing

Automation tools (including n8n,pabbly and zapier)

SEO and copywriting

Other business operations as needed



Role Overview



You will support the team with day to day tasks, help improve processes, and learn new tools and skills as the company grows. This is a remote role with long term growth potential for the right person.



Qualifications:



Exceptional attention to detail and strong organizational skills.

Proficiency in data management, including advanced skills in Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Basic graphic design skills using Canva.

Eager to learn and adapt to new tools and strategies.

Knowledge of understanding processes, documentation of process, documentation of errors in process and propose solutions for errors in process

Comfortable learning new tools and systems (Google Workspace, communication and project tools).

Self motivated, proactive, and open to feedback.

Reliable computer/laptop and stable internet connection.

Big plus if you understand automations like pabbly, zapier, n8n



Experience as a VA is a plus but not required; full training is provided for the right candidate.



How to Apply:



To help us get to know you better, follow these instructions exactly. Applications that do not include all items below will not be reviewed.



1 - Take this DISC test: 
/disc-personality-test/

Send a link to your results/confirmation page (not a screenshot).

/free-personality-test

3 - Take this typing test (30 seconds): 
p?minutes=0.5&textfile=0&mode=sent&result_url=
p&bt=0>=normal

Send a link to your results/confirmation page (not a screenshot).

4 - Attach your updated resume, highlighting your most relevant experience and skills.?

Video(s)

5 - Record a video or multiple short videos answering the questions below. Upload them to a platform (e.g., Google Drive, YouTube, Loom) and make sure the links are public/viewable.

a. About You & Your Goals

Introduce yourself and share your hobbies/passions.

Explain your career, life, and financial goals and in what time frame.

Be very specific: What are you saving money for? What specific item/asset is it? When do you expect to acquire it? How do you plan on achieving that goal?

b. Work & Tech Setup

Show your work setup (computer/laptop, monitor(s), speakers, lights, etc).

c. Process & Problem Solving with AI

Explain how you could have made it easier/faster/better using AI.





 Subject Line

“Virtual Assistant Application – [Your Full Name] – [Your Main Skill]”

In the body of your
/message, briefly share:

What you already know you are good at.

What skill(s) you want to learn next from this role (e.g., SEO, automation, copywriting, editing, etc.).

title: Lead Accountant
description:
Busy tax and accounting firm seeks a Lead Accountant



Duties include:



-Onboard new bookkeeping clients

-Monitor and train bookkeepers on the setup and management of accounting records

-Create and manage chart of accounts and tax links to ensure seamless transfer from QBO to tax software

-Meet with clients monthly to explain their financials, provide insight to areas of concern, and assist them in understanding how business decisions can be improved by using their financials

-Liaison with the tax team to gather data needed for quarterly tax reviews and estimated payments

-Maintain a list of client financial accounts to ensure all items are received for tax return processing

-Maintain client tasks and monitor bookkeepers tasks and billable hours



Candidate will

Be either a CPA or CMA

Have supervisor experience

Excellent english writing and speaking

QBO certified



Position will need to work the majority of their shift between 10am and 6pm Arizona Mountain Time.



Please provide a link to your resume when you apply.

title: STABLE DIFFUSION - LORA
description:
**Job Title:** AI Image Specialist (Stable Diffusion / LoRA / Generative Design)



**Location:** Remote (Philippines preferred)

**Type:** Part-time / Full-time (Flexible hours)

**Compensation:** Competitive (based on experience)



---



### About the Role



We are building a fast-growing digital brand focused on high-quality visual content (social media, carousels, and creative assets). We are looking for a skilled **AI Image Specialist** who can leverage tools like Stable Diffusion to create clean, visually appealing, and consistent designs.



---



### Responsibilities



* Generate high-quality images using **Stable Diffusion**

* Train and use **LoRA models** for consistent style and branding

* Optimize prompts for best visual output (composition, lighting, realism)

* Maintain visual consistency across projects (branding, colors, style)

* Work with reference images and adapt them into AI-generated visuals

* Deliver optimized images ready for Instagram/carousel content



---



### Requirements



* Strong experience with **Stable Diffusion (AUTOMATIC1111, ComfyUI, or similar)**

* Experience creating and training **LoRA models**

* Good understanding of:



  * Prompt engineering

  * Image composition

  * Lighting / realism / aesthetics

* Ability to follow brand guidelines and maintain consistency

* Fast execution and attention to detail



---



### Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)



* Experience with **MidJourney / DALL·E / other AI tools**

* Basic graphic design (Canva / Photoshop)

* Experience creating content for **social media (Instagram, TikTok)**



---



### What We Offer



* Long-term opportunity

* Flexible schedule

* Consistent work flow

* Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling brand



---



### How to Apply



Please include:



1. Portfolio (AI-generated images preferred)

2. Tools you use (Stable Diffusion setup, LoRA experience, etc.)

3. Short explanation of your workflow

4. Your hourly rate



---



We are looking for someone reliable, creative, and detail-oriented who understands modern AI workflows and can produce clean, high-quality visuals consistently.

title: Experienced Short Video Editor
description:
We’re looking for a creative Video Editor with strong, modern editing skills who knows how to make short-form content feel exciting, polished, and highly engaging. You should be great at editing to music, creating strong pacing, and producing videos that hold attention quickly.



This role is focused mostly on short clips for social media ads and content, so experience creating for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and paid social is important.



We’re also looking for someone who is comfortable using AI tools to help create and enhance content. This could include AI-assisted video creation, visuals, captions, voiceovers, cleanup, ideation, or other creative tools that improve speed and quality.



What we’re looking for:



Strong video editing skills with a modern, attention-grabbing style

Excellent sense of timing, pacing, and syncing edits to music

Experience creating short-form social media ads and content

Ability to make videos feel engaging, current, and platform-native

Comfort using AI tools for content creation and editing workflows

Strong understanding of what performs well on social media

Ability to work remotely, communicate clearly, and deliver on time

Bonus if you can do motion graphics, text animation, sound design, or AI-assisted creative production



Responsibilities:



Edit short-form videos for social media ads and organic content

Create engaging, fast-paced edits optimized for attention and retention

Sync cuts, visuals, and pacing closely to music

Add captions, text, effects, transitions, and other creative elements

Use AI tools where helpful to speed up production and enhance creative output

Deliver polished videos in platform-ready formats

Bring creative ideas and stay on top of current content trends



Ideal candidate:

You have a cool, modern editing style, understand internet content, and know how to make videos that feel fresh and effective. You’re also open to using AI as part of your creative workflow to help develop, improve, or produce content more efficiently.



To apply:

Please send your portfolio or sample work, especially short-form content, social ads, or music-synced edits. Examples of AI-assisted work are a plus.

title: HR Operations Administrator (Remote – Philippines)
description:
About the Role



Eco Property Maintenance is a growing Canadian property maintenance company with ~25+ field staff. We are hiring a full-time HR Operations Administrator to own and execute our people processes — hiring support, onboarding, offboarding, employee records, and HR administration. You will work from clear SOPs, checklists, and scripts, and escalate decisions when required.



If you are highly organized, detail-oriented, confident communicating in English, and experienced supporting North American companies remotely — this role will be a great fit.



Key Responsibilities



1. Hiring & Recruitment Support

-Maintain and post job ads across platforms (e.g. Indeed)

-Screen resumes against defined criteria

-Conduct initial screening calls with candidates

-Record call notes and candidate details in our HR system (BambooHR or tracker)

-Complete interviews / record to share with managers

-Track candidates through the hiring pipeline

-Maintain organized hiring records and status updates

-Coordinate trial days with zone managers



2. Onboarding (Primary Focus)

-Send onboarding packages to new hires (contracts, tax forms, personal info forms, etc.)

-Track completion of all onboarding documents

-Maintain and follow onboarding checklists

-Ensure system access, documentation, and setup steps are completed

-Ensure every new hire receives a consistent onboarding experience



3. Off boarding

-Trigger and manage off boarding checklists

-Prepare and process ROEs

-Coordinate benefits cancellation

-Collect company property (documentation + tracking)

-Conduct exit interviews using provided scripts

-Log and categorize exit reasons for management review



4. HR Administration & Compliance Tracking

-Maintain up-to-date employee records

-Track required documents and certifications

-Monitor WCB-related documentation and requirements

-Flag missing or expired documents

-Escalate compliance issues to management when needed

-(You will not interpret employment law — only track and report)



5. Employee Support & Engagement (Structured)

-Schedule and support periodic employee check-ins

-Assist with performance review scheduling

-Track goals and follow-ups for field staff

-Collect employee feedback using structured questions

-Summarize trends and insights for management



What This Role Is NOT

-Making hiring or termination decisions

-Interpreting employment law or policies

-Handling employee conflicts independently

-Negotiating compensation or benefits

-Creating policy without approval

-You will execute processes, document outcomes, and escalate when guidance is needed.



Required Qualifications

-2+ years experience in HR administration, recruitment support, or people operations

-Experience supporting North American (US or Canadian) companies

-Fluent spoken and written English (required)

-Comfortable running screening calls independently

-Strong attention to detail and follow-up

-Confident using checklists, trackers, and SOPs

-Reliable internet and professional remote setup



Preferred Qualifications

-Experience working remotely with Canadian companies

-Familiarity with HR software (BambooHR or similar)

-Experience hiring blue-collar or field-based employees

-Prior VA or remote HR role



Tools You’ll Use

-Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

-BambooHR (or similar HR system)

-Communication tools (whats app /
 / Zoom)



Compensation & Schedule

-$900–$1,200 USD per month

-Full-time: 40 hours per week

-Long-term role with growth potential

-Paid trial period required

title: EA Operator
description:
Your job is to reduce the number of decisions the founder has to make daily.



You will:

 • Turn messy inputs into clean summaries

 • Handle logistics end-to-end (no back and forth)

 • Identify gaps and resolve them before asking

 • Own execution quality across tasks

 • Make sure nothing falls through the cracks



If the founder has to think twice about something you touched, you failed.



Day-to-day responsibilities

 • Inbox + communication filtering (only escalate what matters)

 • Scheduling (no conflicts, no back-and-forth)

 • Travel planning (full plans, not questions)

 • Hiring coordination (screening, scheduling, follow-ups)

 • Ops support (execute + document systems)

 • Managing tools/accounts (clean, secure, organized)

 • Tracking tasks and ensuring completion across team



What success looks like (THIS is key)



Within 7 days:

 • Founder feels noticeably less cognitive load



Within 30 days:

 • 80% of logistics handled without input

 • Tasks come as solutions, not questions



Ongoing:

 • Founder rarely says “this is obvious”

 • Team moves faster because of you



What will get you fired

 • Asking questions that can be inferred

 • Sending messy or unstructured responses

 • Waiting for instructions instead of acting

 • Dropping details or creating more work



Who this is for

 • You think in systems, not tasks

 • You naturally organize chaos

 • You are obsessed with clarity and speed

 • You take ownership without being told



Who this is NOT for

 • Traditional virtual assistants

 • People who need step-by-step instructions

 • People who wait instead of d



Application filter (critical)



To apply, complete this task:



Plan a founder’s trip:

 • Dallas ? Dubai



Send ONE clean plan with assumptions, options, and what you need to confirm.



No back-and-forth.

- Holidays: Paid US Public Holidays

- Paid Time Off: 11 accrued personal days off per year

- Growth: Bonus and salary increase depending on performance



Primary Responsibilities

1.
 handling and phone handling

2. Managing sales channels and submitting orders

3. Tracking sales metrics and online feedback

4. Compiling data and preparing sales reports

5. Communicating with vendors and distributors



Requirements

1. Excellent spoken and written English skills

2. Stable, high-speed internet connection

3. Willingness to be trained and work with us long-term (must have no other job obligations)



*Published salary is for starting only. Multiple salary increases within a year are possible in order to match employee's skill level.



INSTRUCTIONS ON HOW TO APPLY



 the requirements below to 

1. The most recent copy of your resume (as a file attachment)

2. Your complete name and phone number



Note: Use the job title as the subject of your
, e.g. "Ecommerce Account Analyst".



IMPORTANT (You must reply to the
): You will receive an autoreply with a few questions immediately after sending your

Tell your friends about this job opening for a chance to receive a REFERRAL BONUS of $300! For more information, go to

title: Love Gaming? Come Dominate With Us
description:
Running operations here is a lot like dominating in Mobile Legends or Dota 2. You’ll need fast decision-making, clear team communication, and the ability to adapt when things don’t go as planned. If you love teamwork and keeping things in order, this role could be a great fit for you.



Title: Operations Analyst



Important: Make sure to read the full listing for application instructions.



Hours: Full-time (45+ hours per week), long-term

Days: 5 days a week, 8am to 6pm or similar, exact days of week TBD

Time-zone: U.S. Central Time (CST)

Pay: $1100 USD / month



Role:

- Ensure our stores have the right amount of inventory in stock by placing the right orders

- Communicate effectively with on-the-ground teams by both phone and text to coordinate activities and facilitate operations

- Troubleshoot problems as they arise in operational processes

- Hold tea
mbers accountable for their responsibilities and performance

Why Join Us:
