title: Insurance Billing Specialist (Must have Auto experience)
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

Our client is an established auto dealership based in the greater Atlanta, Georgia area. The team operates with a strong culture of integrity and accountability, and is growing its virtual support staff to better manage financial operations. This is a close-knit environment where reliable professionals are recognized and given real opportunity to advance.

 

ABOUT THE ROLE

We are hiring on behalf of a U.S.-based auto dealership seeking a detail-oriented and trustworthy Virtual Payments and Insurance Accounts Specialist. This is an additive role joining an existing virtual team, with full ownership of payment processing and insurance account management from day one. The right candidate brings automotive accounts experience, operates with a high degree of integrity, and is ready to grow into an Accounts Manager role over time.

 

RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Manage and process customer and vendor payments accurately and on schedule

2. Oversee insurance accounts, renewals, and documentation for the dealership

3. Maintain organized records of all payment activity and insurance correspondence

4. Coordinate with the owner and internal team on outstanding balances and account status updates

5. Flag discrepancies, issues, or high-priority items requiring immediate attention

6. Support accounts reconciliation and reporting as needed

7. Identify opportunities to improve payment and insurance workflows over time

 

REQUIREMENTS

Must-Have Qualifications

1. 2+ years of experience managing payments, billing, or insurance accounts in an automotive or dealership environment

2. Demonstrated experience in a supervisory or managerial capacity within an accounts or finance function

3. High level of trustworthiness, discretion, and professional integrity

4. Strong attention to detail with a track record of accurate, timely work

5. Reliable internet connection and ability to communicate during U.S. Eastern business hours

 

Preferred Qualifications

1. Experience with auto dealership management systems (e.g., CDK, Reynolds & Reynolds, or similar DMS platforms)

2. Familiarity with insurance account management processes in the U.S. automotive market

3. Proficiency with accounting or payment platforms (e.g., QuickBooks, FreshBooks, or similar tools)

4. Experience working in a virtual or remote capacity with U.S.-based clients

 

KEY TRAITS WE’RE LOOKING FOR

1. Trustworthy and Accountable: Handles sensitive financial and insurance information with full discretion and professionalism.

2. Detail-Oriented: Catches errors before they become problems. Maintains clean, organized records consistently.

3. Proactive Communicator: Surfaces issues early and keeps the team informed without needing to be prompted.

4. Growth-Oriented: Brings a manager’s mindset to the role from day one and is ready to grow into full accounts leadership.

5. Dependable: Shows up, follows through, and delivers on commitments every time.

 

HOW TO APPLY

Interested candidates will complete a pre-recorded video interview and submit their resume for review. Top candidates will be shortlisted and forwarded to our client for final evaluation.

 

This is an opportunity to join a high-trust team where your automotive accounts expertise will be recognized and rewarded with real growth.

title: Do you love making people feel cared for? Support our CEOs as an Executive Personal Assistant!
description:
Title: Executive Personal Assistant



Important: Make sure to read the full listing for application instructions.



Do you love making people feel cared for? Are you the one who remembers everyone’s birthdays, plans amazing gatherings, makes fun plans, and brings warmth into the lives of those around you?



This is NOT your typical assistant job. It’s deeply personal. You’ll work with a kind but intense U.S.-based pair of brothers (proven entrepreneurs working as Co-CEOs of the same business) to support their lives, not the company they are building. From keeping friendships alive and planning meaningful experiences to sending thoughtful gifts and helping them stay on track with personal goals, you’ll be part organizer, part cheerleader, part coach. If you’ve ever been called the “mom” of your group and you’re looking for a decades-long position, this might be your dream job.



Your Role

* Build trust by executing on tasks and communicating clearly, which will lead to taking on more responsibility, which will then lead to increases in pay.

* Keep relationships thriving by managing a personal CRM and helping stay in touch with friends and family.

* Use technology to help automate certain tasks that are repetitive.

* Track habits, support routines, and act as an accountability partner for personal goals.

* Pick out thoughtful, creative gifts for birthdays and other special 
nts.

* Research products, tools, and ideas to make life easier, better, or more fun.

* Plan and book unforgettable travel, great hotels, and the perfect dinner spots.

* Jump in on special personal projects wherever a helping hand is needed.



What’s In It for You

* A Long-Term Role: This is meant to last. The entrepreneurs who you'd be an assistant to are looking for a lifetime assistant.

* Great Place to Work: These entrepreneurs are known to have a super high retention rate of employees and create a great work environment.

* Creative Work: From planning memorable trips to picking out the perfect gift, this role lets you flex your creative muscles and thoughtful side every day.

* Variety: No two days will feel the same. You’ll get to research, plan, coach, organize, and more.

* Paid Leave: You'll get at least 10 days of paid leave plus major holidays.

* Remote Flexibility: Work from the comfort of your home and gain flexibility with hours once trust is built.



Desired Attributes

* Extremely caring, social people-person who will excel in personal tasks

* High attention to detail and organizational skills

* Very strong written and oral English skills

* Minimum 50 Mbps Internet Speed

* Designated office space in your home



To apply and ensure your application is considered, do all of the following two steps:

1. DM with a quick introduction to yourself if you're interested. Include the word "cupcake" *in your subject line*, and Include your resume. ++Bonus points for a video introduction, though it's not strictly required

2. Fill out this form:

3.  Add the Letters "PA" in the "What's your full name" field [E.g. PA - John Doe], so we know what role you are applying for.

title: Collections and Accounts Receivable Specialist (Homeowner Insurance Required)
description:
About the Opportunity



Our amazing client is a nationally recognized leader in environmental and restoration services, specializing in property damage restoration, mold remediation, moisture control, and air quality improvement. With a strong commitment to helping property owners recover quickly and efficiently, they serve residential and commercial clients across the United States.



Their team is growing, and they are looking for dedicated professionals to support their mission of delivering exceptional service.





Role Overview



Our amazing client is seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Collections & Accounts Receivable Specialist to join their team remotely from the Philippines.



This role is critical to maintaining healthy cash flow by managing outstanding accounts, following up on insurance claims, and ensuring timely collections. A significant component of this role involves reviewing and interpreting insurance estimates, including understanding line items, pricing, scope of work, and coverage details.



The ideal candidate is a self-starter who thrives in a fast-paced environment, takes ownership of their work, and consistently delivers results.



Key Responsibilities



• Manage the full collections cycle, including outbound calls,
s, and follow-ups to recover outstanding balances from clients and insurance carriers.

• Review, interpret, and analyze insurance estimates and restoration project documentation, including line items, scope of work, pricing breakdowns, and coverage details.

• Cross-reference insurance estimates against invoices and job records to identify discrepancies, underpayments, or missing line items.

• Track, process, and follow up on property insurance claims, ensuring timely resolution and payment.

• Communicate with insurance adjusters, carriers, and third-party administrators to resolve claim disputes and negotiate payment.

• Maintain and update the CRM system daily with accurate notes, payment statuses, claim updates, and communication logs.

• Reconcile accounts receivable records and investigate discrepancies to ensure accurate billing.

• Coordinate with internal teams to resolve billing disputes, obtain supporting documentation, and expedite claim approvals.

• Generate accounts receivable aging reports and provide regular status updates to management.

• Identify delinquent accounts and implement appropriate escalation procedures.

• Maintain organized records of all collection activities and correspondence.

• Ensure compliance with company policies and best practices related to accounts receivable and collections.





Required Qualifications



• Minimum 2 years of experience in collections, accounts receivable, or a related financial/accounting operations role.

• Demonstrated experience reading, interpreting, and working with insurance estimates, particularly in the property restoration, construction, or insurance adjusting industry. This is a core function of the role and cannot be learned on the job.

• Experience working with property insurance claims, including communication with adjusters and carriers.

• Proficiency with CRM platforms and accounting software.

• Excellent verbal and written English communication skills.

• Strong attention to detail with the ability to manage multiple accounts simultaneously.

• Self-motivated with a proven ability to meet deadlines and achieve targets with minimal supervision.

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and a dedicated, quiet home office setup.





Preferred Qualifications



• Prior experience as an insurance adjuster, claims processor, or estimator, or in a role that required daily review of Xactimate, Symbility, or similar estimating platforms.

• Experience supporting US-based companies in the property restoration, remediation, or home services industry.

• Familiarity with the full insurance claim lifecycle, from FNOL through settlement.

• Background in accounting operations, invoicing, or financial reporting.

• Experience working full-time US Eastern Time Zone hours.





What Our Client Offers



• Competitive monthly compensation based on experience and skill level.

• Full-time, stable position with a growing US-based company.

• Opportunity to make a meaningful impact on the business and grow within the organization.

• Supportive management with clear communication and expectations.

• A collaborative team environment that values accountability and results.





Work Requirements



• This is a full-time, dedicated position. The selected candidate must work exclusively for the company during business hours and may not hold concurrent employment.

• Time-tracking software will be installed from day one as part of standard company policy.

• Work hours align with US Eastern Time Zone (EST/EDT) business hours, approximately 40–45 hours per week.

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Looking for a marketing manager for a commercial real estate firm. 



Main activities will consist of

 marketing campaigns to new prospects.

Needs to be familiar with Pipedrive or comparable CRM

title: Part time PPC Manager (Google & Bing Ads)
description:
Role Overview:

We are seeking an experienced PPC Manager to lead the development, execution, and optimization of paid search campaigns across both Google Ads and Bing Ads. The ideal candidate will have a hands-on understanding of both platforms and proven success managing large-scale, complex campaigns with significant budgets. You will be responsible for delivering results-driven campaigns that align with client goals while maintaining a deep understanding of industry best practices. Previous experience working at Google or a strong insider knowledge of Google Ads best practices is highly advantageous.

As a PPC Manager, you’ll be the go-to expert for all things paid search and will have a direct impact on client performance. The role requires a strategic mindset, data-driven decision-making, and the ability to maintain clear and effective communication with both internal teams and clients.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Paid Search Strategy & Execution:

Campaign Development & Management: Develop, launch, and manage paid search campaigns on Google Ads and Bing Ads, ensuring they are aligned with client objectives and maximize ROI. This includes campaigns on Google Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping, and Bing Search.

Keyword Research & Audience Targeting: Conduct extensive keyword research, competitor analysis, and audience segmentation to identify growth opportunities. Develop comprehensive strategies based on these insights to optimize targeting and bidding.

Campaign Optimization: Continuously analyze and refine campaigns to improve performance metrics such as CPC, CTR, CPA, and ROAS. Implement A/B testing strategies for ad creatives, landing pages, and bidding strategies to maximize conversions.

Ad Copy & Creative Strategy: Work closely with the creative team to ensure that ad copy, creatives, and landing pages are optimized for user engagement and aligned with campaign goals.

2. Client Communication & Consultation:

Client Liaison: Serve as the main point of contact for clients, providing expert consultation on all Google Ads and Bing Ads strategies. Clearly communicate campaign progress, adjustments, and results to ensure client satisfaction and alignment with business objectives.

Performance Reporting: Regularly prepare and present in-depth performance reports, including key performance metrics (CPC, CTR, CPA, ROAS) and actionable insights. Use these reports to showcase campaign successes and provide strategic recommendations for optimization.

Strategic Guidance: Offer strategic recommendations to clients, advising on how to improve campaign performance, expand reach, or address performance challenges. Proactively identify opportunities for growth.

Client Relationship Management: Build and nurture strong relationships with clients, becoming a trusted advisor on paid search and digital marketing. Ensure high levels of client satisfaction, resolve campaign-related issues, and manage client expectations effectively.

3. Budget Management & Performance Tracking:

Budget Oversight: Manage and optimize client budgets across both Google Ads and Bing Ads to ensure campaigns are efficient and within budget. Track and report on budget pacing and ensure that client goals are met while maximizing ROI.

Performance Tracking & Analysis: Utilize Google Analytics, Microsoft Advertising Intelligence, Google Tag Manager, and other analytics platforms to monitor campaign performance in real time. Assess KPIs such as CPC, CTR, CPA, and ROAS to ensure campaigns are delivering results within the defined parameters.

Optimization: Make data-driven decisions to optimize campaigns for better performance. Adjust bids, keywords, targeting, and ads based on performance trends and competitive insights.

4. Collaboration & Cross-Functional Alignment:

Team Collaboration: Work closely with the broader digital marketing team (SEO, Social Media, Creative, Web Development) to ensure that PPC campaigns are integrated into wider marketing and sales strategies. Align campaigns with broader business objectives, ensuring a cohesive approach across all digital channels.

Stakeholder Coordination: Collaborate with internal stakeholders to ensure paid search efforts align with company goals and support sales or product launch strategies.

Knowledge Sharing: Actively contribute to knowledge-sharing within the marketing team by educating peers about PPC best practices, emerging trends, and new tools or features in Google Ads and Bing Ads.

5. Industry Trend Awareness & Innovation:

Stay Current with PPC Trends: Stay up-to-date with the latest Google Ads and Bing Ads updates, features, and best practices. Attend webinars, conferences, and industry events to keep ahead of emerging trends and leverage new opportunities for clients.

Test New Strategies: Continuously evaluate and experiment with new tools, bidding strategies, and ad formats to ensure campaigns are always optimized and competitive. Propose new strategies to clients based on these findings.

6. Reporting & Data-Driven Insights:

Regular Reporting: Create and maintain regular performance reports, dashboards, and presentations to track campaign progress, analyze performance trends, and showcase ROI. Present these findings in a clear, concise manner to clients and internal teams.

Actionable Insights: Translate complex data into actionable insights that drive campaign improvements. Provide clear, data-backed recommendations to both internal and client stakeholders to guide future PPC strategies and decisions.

Attribution & Conversion Tracking: Implement and manage proper tracking systems to measure campaign effectiveness and provide accurate reporting on conversions, revenue, and other key metrics.



Qualifications:

Education:

Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience). Certifications in Google Ads and Bing Ads are a plus.



Experience:

Proven PPC Experience: Minimum of 3–5 years of hands-on experience managing PPC campaigns across Google Ads and Bing Ads. This includes experience in Google Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping, and Bing Search campaigns.

Agency or Client Experience: Experience working in a client-facing role, ideally in a digital marketing agency, managing multiple PPC accounts with large-scale budgets.

Experience at Google (Bonus): Previous experience working at Google or within a Google Partner agency is highly desirable, particularly if you have in-depth knowledge of Google Ads best practices, new features, and insights from working directly with the platform.



Technical Skills:

Google Ads & Bing Ads Expertise: Advanced proficiency in managing campaigns across Google Ads and Bing Ads, including search, display, shopping, remarketing, and video campaigns.

Analytics Tools Proficiency: Strong working knowledge of Google Analytics, Microsoft Advertising Intelligence, Google Tag Manager, and other relevant analytics and tracking tools to measure, report, and optimize PPC campaign performance.

Data Interpretation: Ability to analyze large datasets, interpret complex data, and turn insights into actionable strategies to optimize campaign performance.



Soft Skills:

Excellent Communication & Presentation Skills: Ability to explain complex PPC strategies and performance data in a clear, concise, and accessible manner for clients, internal teams, and stakeholders.

Client Management Experience: Proven experience in building and nurturing strong client relationships. Ability to manage client expectations and resolve issues in a timely and professional manner.

Problem-Solving & Proactive Mindset: Strong problem-solving skills, with a proactive approach to identifying and addressing campaign issues. Ability to think critically and take strategic action based on data.

Attention to Detail: High attention to detail, ensuring that campaign elements are precise and accurately reflect client objectives, even when working with large volumes of data.



How to Apply:

If you’re an experienced PPC Manager looking for a new challenge, we want to hear from you! Please submit your resume, along with a cover letter outlining your relevant experience. Include any specific campaigns or achievements that highlight your expertise with Google Ads and Bing Ads.

Stay Current with PPC Trends: Stay up-to-date with the latest Google Ads and Bing Ads updates, features, and best practices. Attend webinars, conferences, and industry events to keep ahead of emerging trends and leverage new opportunities for clients.

Test New Strategies: Continuously evaluate and experiment with new tools, bidding strategies, and ad formats to ensure campaigns are always optimized and competitive. Propose new strategies to clients based on these findings.

6. Reporting & Data-Driven Insights:

Regular Reporting: Create and maintain regular performance reports, dashboards, and presentations to track campaign progress, analyze performance trends, and showcase ROI. Present these findings in a clear, concise manner to clients and internal teams.

Actionable Insights: Translate complex data into actionable insights that drive campaign improvements. Provide clear, data-backed recommendations to both internal and client stakeholders to guide future PPC strategies and decisions.

Attribution & Conversion Tracking: Implement and manage proper tracking systems to measure campaign effectiveness and provide accurate reporting on conversions, revenue, and other key metrics.



Qualifications:

Education:

Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience). Certifications in Google Ads and Bing Ads are a plus.



Experience:

Proven PPC Experience: Minimum of 3–5 years of hands-on experience managing PPC campaigns across Google Ads and Bing Ads. This includes experience in Google Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping, and Bing Search campaigns.

Agency or Client Experience: Experience working in a client-facing role, ideally in a digital marketing agency, managing multiple PPC accounts with large-scale budgets.

Experience at Google (Bonus): Previous experience working at Google or within a Google Partner agency is highly desirable, particularly if you have in-depth knowledge of Google Ads best practices, new features, and insights from working directly with the platform.



Technical Skills:

Google Ads & Bing Ads Expertise: Advanced proficiency in managing campaigns across Google Ads and Bing Ads, including search, display, shopping, remarketing, and video campaigns.

Analytics Tools Proficiency: Strong working knowledge of Google Analytics, Microsoft Advertising Intelligence, Google Tag Manager, and other relevant analytics and tracking tools to measure, report, and optimize PPC campaign performance.

Data Interpretation: Ability to analyze large datasets, interpret complex data, and turn insights into actionable strategies to optimize campaign performance.



Soft Skills:

Excellent Communication & Presentation Skills: Ability to explain complex PPC strategies and performance data in a clear, concise, and accessible manner for clients, internal teams, and stakeholders.

Client Management Experience: Proven experience in building and nurturing strong client relationships. Ability to manage client expectations and resolve issues in a timely and professional manner.

Problem-Solving & Proactive Mindset: Strong problem-solving skills, with a proactive approach to identifying and addressing campaign issues. Ability to think critically and take strategic action based on data.

Attention to Detail: High attention to detail, ensuring that campaign elements are precise and accurately reflect client objectives, even when working with large volumes of data.



How to Apply:

If you’re an experienced PPC Manager looking for a new challenge, we want to hear from you! Please submit your resume, along with a cover letter outlining your relevant experience here. Include any specific campaigns or achievements that highlight your expertise with Google Ads and Bing Ads.

title: Creative Quality Manager
description:
ROLE SUMMARY

We are looking for a highly perceptive, creatively sharp Creative Quality Manager to help strengthen the quality, consistency, and scalability of our photo and video delivery pipeline. This person will serve as a high-level internal creative checkpoint — reviewing deliverables, identifying recurring quality issues, spotting patterns across shooters and editors, and helping our team improve creative consistency without adding more burden to already-stretched internal leaders. This is not a basic admin or upload role. We are looking for someone with a strong creative eye first, especially in video, who can also think operationally, document issues clearly, and help improve backend workflows over time.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN

- Review video deliverables before final delivery to ensure quality and consistency

- Catch technical and creative misses before they reach the client

- Identify patterns across shooters and editors, including recurring strengths, misses, and coaching opportunities

- Flag issues related to coverage, pacing, framing, shot variety, detail shots, creative direction, music choice, captions, and overall polish

- Organize observations and feedback clearly for internal leadership

- Help create stronger quality control standards and backend review processes

- Support delivery readiness by ensuring projects are complete, clean, and aligned with internal expectations

- Help reduce the amount of proofing, review, and repetitive delivery work sitting on senior internal tea
mbers

- Contribute to SOPs, workflow improvements, and quality documentation as the team grows

- Writing feedback briefs to photographers and videographers regarding review and delivery

- Ensuring brand standards for photos and videos (correct logos, fonts, colors, etc.)



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Fewer quality issues slipping through to clients

- Better visibility into shooter/editor performance trends

- Stronger internal feedback loops for creative coaching

- More consistency across delivered video content

- Less manual review burden on the internal team

- Cleaner backend systems and a more scalable delivery process



IDEAL BACKGROUND

- Strong video editing or post-production background

- Excellent creative judgment and attention to detail

- Ability to spot both technical and aesthetic issues quickly

- Experience reviewing work for quality, not just producing it

- Organized, process-aware, and able to document findings clearly

- Real estate media experience

- Comfortable working behind the scenes in a support and oversight capacity

- Strong AI skillsets such as Higgsfield, Nano Banana Pro, Eleven Labs, Claude, and others



NICE TO HAVE

- Experience working in a fast-paced, high-volume creative environment

- Familiarity with distributed editing teams or offshore creative support

- Operational or workflow improvement experience

- Experience helping train, guide, or support photographers/editors



THIS ROLE IS NOT

- A client-facing phone support role

- A purely admin or upload-only VA role

- A replacement for creative leadership

- A basic checklist-only QC seat



This role is for someone who can combine creative discernment, consistency, and backend support to help level up our internal quality control and creative execution.



WHO YOU ARE

You have a strong eye, high standards, and good taste. You notice what others miss. You care about the difference between “technically complete” and “actually good.” You can bring structure to creative work without draining the humanity out of it. You help teams get better, not just busier.

title: Graphic Designer - AI & Native Ads (DTC E-commerce)
description:
We are a growing DTC e-commerce brand in the health and wellness space. We’re looking for a highly skilled Graphic Designer who can create a high volume of high-performing static ads AND native-style “ugly” ads for Meta/Facebook—creatives that blend into the feed, stop the scroll, and drive conversions. 



To be considered, you must include the word “RDM” in the title of your application.



About the Role

This role is not about making things “pretty.” It’s about making creatives that sell at scale. You will be expected to generate multiple static ads on a daily basis.



You’ll design:



Clean, high-converting static image ads



Raw, native-style ugly ads that don’t look like ads



You’ll work closely with our team to turn hooks, angles, and ad copy into visuals that perform. If you understand direct response design, know how to leverage AI for rapid asset generation, and know when polished works vs. when ugly wins, this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Designing



Direct response static ads (image + text overlays) highlighting products.



Native / ugly image ads (raw, unpolished, feed-blending creatives)



Before / after comparison ads



Testimonial and review-based creatives



Screenshot-style, notes-style, WhatsApp-style ugly ads



Headline-driven clickbait ads



Educational infographic-style ads



Hook-first scroll stoppers for cold traffic



What You’ll Own



Creative Output: Create attention-grabbing native ad images that generate high CTRs. You will develop both simple designs and more complex compositions with advanced editing.



High-Volume Execution: Generate a high volume of static and ugly ads daily from briefs and copy.



AI Integration: Utilize AI tools extensively to enhance productivity and creative output. Quickly convert AI-generated base visuals into high-performing ad creatives.



Testing & Iteration: Create multiple variations for A/B testing (hooks, layouts, formats) and adapt designs based on performance data to optimize click-through rates.



Systematization: Turn winning formats into repeatable systems.



Platform Optimization: Ensure designs are optimized for Meta & TikTok specs (including maintaining strict 1:1 aspect ratios when required).



Who You Are



1+ year of experience designing ads for DTC e-commerce.



Available to dedicate 30-40 hours a week to our operation.



Strong understanding of direct response principles and exactly what makes images "clickable" in native ad environments.



Highly skilled at AI image generation and editing tools, alongside Figma, Photoshop, or similar software.



Comfortable designing both polished static ads and raw ugly ads.



Ability to work independently with minimal direction, taking a concept and executing it quickly.



Excellent communication and a track record of timely delivery.



Understands that ugly ? lazy; it’s strategic.



Bonus (Nice to Have)



Experience using specific AI design tools (Nano Banana, Midjourney, etc.).



Background in health, beauty, or wellness brands.



Familiarity with Meta ad performance feedback loops.



Basic understanding of copywriting for ads.



You’ll Thrive Here If…



You believe good design = design that converts.



You understand when native ugly ads outperform polished ones.



You enjoy testing, iterating, and improving creatives at a high volume.



You hate over-designed fluff.



You want your work to directly impact revenue.



Growth Path

Graphic Designer ? Senior Designer ? Lead Designer ? Creative Strategist



To Apply

Please send:



Your resume / CV



A portfolio demonstrating your expertise in creating compelling ad visuals (especially those utilizing AI generation)



(If possible) examples of ads that actually performed



A short note on how you approach direct response ad design

title: Engineering Manager (Delivery & Execution)
description:
We are seeking an Engineering manager who can own predictable delivery across engineering by enforcing sprint discipline, decision clarity, and execution standards. Reduce coordination cost, eliminate rework, and ensure that engineering output is reviewable, shippable, and on time.



Core Responsibilities



Sprint Ownership & Delivery Control

• Own sprint planning, execution, and closure

• Enforce sprint scope boundaries (no silent mid-sprint additions)

• Ensure all tickets entering a sprint meet Definition of Ready

• Track and act on: ticket aging, spillover, churn, blocked work

• Move tickets aggressively across states (TODO ? IN PROGRESS ? REVIEW ? DONE)

• Kill zombie tickets



Timebox Enforcement

• Treat timeboxes as coordination contracts, not estimates

• Require proactive communication before a timebox slips

• Block review if timebox standards are violated

• Escalate early, not after the fact



Execution Quality Gates

• Enforce: Definition of Ready (before sprint), Definition of Done (before release)

• Reject work that: contains implicit decisions, lacks acceptance criteria, introduces duplication without approval

• Ensure code review happens before QA

• Ensure QA does not compensate for missing engineering clarity



Decision Discipline (in partnership with TPM / Product)

• Require explicit tracking of: Open Decisions, Frozen Decisions

• Block execution on unresolved architectural decisions

• Ensure decisions are made by the right group, at the right time

• Prevent “decision by implementation”



5. Engineering Standards Enforcement

• Enforce agreed standards consistently: no duplication without approval, no implicit architecture decisions, no skipping ticket states

• Treat violations as delivery risk, not personal issues

• Track repeat violations and escalate



Required Skills & Traits



Must Have

• Strong judgment around delivery tradeoffs

• Comfort enforcing rules and saying “no”

• Ability to stop work and force alignment

• Low tolerance for ambiguity in execution

• Bias for early escalation over late heroics

• Calm under pressure, emotionally neutral

• Experience running sprints that actually ship

• Strong English language skills

• Familiarity with Jira-style workflows



Nice to Have

• Background as senior engineer

• Experience in SaaS / platform teams

• Worked alongside TPMs or Product Managers

title: Product Manager (Technical) / Software Architect
description:
We are seeking a Technical Product Manager / Architect who bridges product design and engineering execution. This role combines system-level thinking, architectural oversight, and clear, actionable documentation—producing deliverables engineers can build from directly. The ideal candidate can translate business needs into architecture diagrams, wireframes, and well-scoped tickets with code-level precision, ensuring efficient handoff and reduced rework.



Requirements & Documentation

• Author architecture-aware product specifications including system diagrams, logic flows, and key technical dependencies.

• Prepare engineer-ready tickets, including pseudocode, scaffolding, or sample API structures.

• Conduct architecture and code reviews, identifying potential design or implementation issues early.

• Build wireframes, mockups, and interaction flows using Figma or equivalent tools to align engineering and UX/UI early in the cycle.

• Collaborate with engineering to ensure technical feasibility and architectural scalability before feature commitment.

Cross-Functional Execution

• Work closely with engineering leads to break down architecture into structured deliverables and sprint-ready tasks.

• Lead technical review sessions to validate assumptions and architecture decisions before coding begins.



Qualifications

• Strong understanding of software architecture principles, REST APIs, and modular system design.

• Hands-on experience writing or reviewing code in PHP, JavaScript, and SQL preferred.

• Proficiency in creating wireframes, prototypes, and UI flows that accurately reflect data and system constraints.

• Ability to evaluate trade-offs between architectural purity, delivery speed, and scalability.

• Prior experience functioning as a bridge between engineering and design, ensuring clarity and readiness for execution.

title: Experienced Business Funding VA (0% Credit Card Stacking & High-Limit Approvals)
description:
We are a fast-growing U.S.-based business funding company helping entrepreneurs access $50K–$250K+ in 0% business credit and strategic financing.



We are looking for a highly experienced Virtual Assistant who understands business funding at a deep level — not just processing applications, but structuring profiles for maximum approvals.



This is NOT an entry-level position.



You must have real experience funding clients through major U.S. banks and lenders.



Responsibilities



You will be responsible for:



• Structuring and processing 0% business credit card applications

• Managing client funding strategy (stacking 3–5 cards strategically)

• Working with major banks including:

• Chase (Ink, Unlimited, etc.)

• American Express (Business Gold, Platinum, etc.)

• Bank of America

• Wells Fargo

• U.S. Bank

• Truist

• Understanding underwriting guidelines and approval data points

• Advising on credit profile positioning (utilization, inquiries, age, etc.)

• Managing reconsideration calls if needed

• Processing personal funding applications (personal loans, credit cards, etc.)

• Tracking approvals, limits, and optimizing stacking sequence

• Communicating professionally with clients







Required Experience



You MUST have:



Proven experience funding U.S. business owners

 Experience with 0% interest credit card stacking

Knowledge of high-limit approval strategies

Understanding of credit profile optimization

Experience handling reconsideration calls

Familiarity with lender underwriting data points

Experience processing personal loans & personal credit cards

Strong understanding of credit utilization, inquiries, tradelines, and FICO impact



If you have never funded clients before — do NOT apply.



What We’re Looking For



We want someone who:



• Thinks strategically

• Knows how to maximize approvals

• Understands lender psychology

• Can identify weak profiles before submission

• Knows which banks pull which bureaus

• Understands timing between applications

• Knows how to avoid triggering fraud flags



This role requires deep knowledge — not just admin support.

title: SEO, Content Creation and Ads Specialist
description:
Job Title: SEO, Content Creation and Ads Specialist

Employment Type: Full-Time

Location: Remote

Salary: Up to PHP 25,000–35,000/month + commission (depending on qualifications and interview outcomes)



About the Role



Vertex Group is an Australian NDIS-focused business portfolio operating various brands across provider management software, compliance consulting, participant support, and plan management. We are looking for an SEO Specialist with strong content writing skills to grow our organic presence across traditional search engines and AI-driven platforms.



This role goes beyond standard SEO execution. You will own keyword strategy, produce high-quality content, manage technical SEO, and build our visibility in AI-generated search results — including platforms like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. You will work across multiple brands within the NDIS sector, so understanding this space is a clear advantage.



What You Will Do

SEO & Content Strategy



• Develop and execute SEO strategies that produce measurable organic growth across the Vertex Group brand portfolio.

• Create high-quality, NLP-friendly content aligned with target audience search intent and business goals.

• Build and maintain content frameworks, SOPs, and reusable execution templates.

• Optimise content for AI-generated search results through Answer Optimisation (AO) and Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO) techniques.

• Map content to funnel stages, from awareness through to conversion.



Keyword Research & Search Intent



• Own keyword research and identify high-impact opportunities across all brands.

• Map search intent across traditional and AI-driven search journeys.

• Align keyword targeting with audience segments, including NDIS providers, participants, and plan managers.



Technical SEO



• Identify and resolve technical issues including indexation, crawlability, Core Web Vitals, and site performance.

• Conduct regular SEO audits using industry-standard tools.

• Collaborate with developers and the marketing team to implement technical fixes efficiently.

• Manage and optimise WordPress websites using Elementor or equivalent page builders.



Paid Ads & Performance Marketing



• Plan, launch, and optimise paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms.

• Manage and optimise campaigns on LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads,
 Ads, and YouTube Ads.

• Conduct A/B testing on creatives, copy, and targeting strategies to improve ROI.

• Monitor ad performance metrics (CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS) and provide actionable insights.

• Align paid campaigns with SEO and content strategies for full-funnel marketing impact.



Data, Reporting & Performance Tracking



• Track organic and paid performance using GA4, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, SEMrush, and other tools.

• Deliver clear, actionable reports on SEO performance, ad campaigns, and content effectiveness.

• Monitor performance across both traditional search and emerging AI search channels.



Backlink & Authority Building



• Build quality backlinks through competitor analysis, outreach, and community engagement (Quora, Reddit, industry forums).

• Conduct domain authority and link quality analysis.

• Identify scalable, repeatable link acquisition opportunities.



Trends & Continuous Improvement



• Stay current with SEO, GEO, paid ads trends, and AI search developments including LLM-based search and platform shifts across Google, TikTok, and Instagram.

• Filter signal from noise — focus on high-impact changes, not every algorithm update.



Requirements



• 2–4 years of hands-on SEO experience with a proven record of driving organic growth.

• Strong content writing skills — you can produce clear, well-structured, optimised content independently.

• Solid understanding of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO.

• Hands-on experience managing paid ads (LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads,
 Ads, and YouTube Ads).

• Experience with WordPress content management and optimisation.

• Hands-on experience with Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, GA4, and Google Search Console.

• Familiarity with GEO and AI-driven search platforms (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews).

• Strong analytical mindset — you translate data into clear next actions.

• Fluent in written and spoken English.

• Able to work independently and manage multiple projects in a remote setting.



Preferred Qualifications



• Knowledge of the Australian NDIS (National Disability Insurance Scheme).

• Experience in a multi-brand environment.

• Active participation in Reddit, Quora, or niche community platforms.

• Familiarity with Answer Optimisation (AO) and structured content for AI citation.

• Experience with Elementor or similar WordPress page builders.

• Understanding of local SEO, particularly within Australian markets.



A Note on NDIS Knowledge



The NDIS sector has its own language, compliance framework, and audience behaviour. Candidates who already understand terms like Support Coordination, Plan Management, NDIS registration, and the NDIS Quality and Safeguards Commission will move faster and create more relevant content from day one. This knowledge is not mandatory — but it is a strong differentiator.

title: Affiliate Manager
description:
Job Description:



Full-Time | Work From Home | Ecommerce & Influencer Partnerships



SRI Labs is a fast-growing, premium beauty & wellness ecommerce brand known for high-end skincare, hair tools, and breakthrough consumer products. We’re looking for a driven, organized, and relationship-focused Affiliate Manager to lead and scale our affiliate program across platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, and key influencer networks.



If you love partnering with creators, optimizing affiliate performance, and helping a brand grow through relationships — this is the role for you.



What You’ll Do



As our Affiliate Manager, you will own the entire affiliate ecosystem and work directly with the CEO and marketing leadership team to scale creator-led revenue.



Key Responsibilities



Manage and optimize SRI Labs’ affiliate program across ShopMy, Levanta, and other affiliate platforms.

Recruit, vet, and onboard new affiliates, creators, and influencers that align with our brand.

Build strong long-term relationships with partners to drive consistent revenue and brand growth.

Track performance, payouts, ROI, and ensure all affiliates are supported with assets, codes, and campaigns.

Coordinate affiliate-driven launches, seasonal promotions, and strategic campaigns.

Identify top performers and build incentive strategies to maximize their output.

Maintain reporting dashboards and communicate results to leadership weekly.

Collaborate with internal marketing, product, design, and operations teams to support affiliate needs.

Continuously test new platforms, creators, strategies, and incentives to grow revenue.

Who You Are



We’re looking for someone who is:



Based in the Philippines

Experienced in affiliate, influencer marketing, or digital partnerships (1–3+ years preferred).

Organized, reliable, and able to manage many creators and campaigns at once.

Strong at relationship-building — someone affiliates love to work with.

Comfortable working within platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, Impact, or similar tools.

Data-driven with excellent follow-through and communication skills.

Hungry, proactive, and passionate about helping a brand grow.

Why Join SRI Labs?



Remote work

Work directly with a high-performing founding team

Competitive salary based on experience

Long-term growth potential within a fast-scaling ecommerce company

Supportive, positive culture built around speed, innovation, and passion for great products

Opportunity to make a big impact — your work will directly drive revenue and brand expansion

How to Apply



 your resume and a quick 2–3 sentence introduction 



Subject Line: Affiliate Manager – [Your Name]



Include:



Links to affiliate programs or creators you’ve worked with

Any relevant platforms/tools you’ve used

Your expected monthly salary (in PHP)

Job Type: Full-time

title: Email Marketing Manager (ECommerce) - Full Time, Remote
description:
We are looking for a strategic and performance-driven
 & SMS Marketing Manager to lead the charge in growing and optimizing our owned marketing channels. This role is key to delivering high-converting campaigns that drive customer engagement, retention, and revenue across our skincare and hair care product lines. You’ll turn customer insights into action, bringing value at every touchpoint while aligning messaging with product and brand goals.





Primary Duties and Responsibilities:

Own the strategy, execution, and optimization of all
 and SMS campaigns for multiple product lines (e.g., hair thinning shampoo, supplements, anti-aging SPF, and skin supplements).

Segment audiences and personalize messaging to maximize relevance, engagement, and conversion.

Develop and manage high-performing lifecycle flows including welcome, cart abandonment, post-purchase, and win-back sequences.

A/B test subject lines, content, offers, and creative assets to continuously improve key performance metrics (CTR, open rate, CVR, revenue per send).

Monitor and report on campaign performance; adjust strategy based on insights and trends.

Build surveys and gather customer feedback to inform future content and product ideas.

Collaborate with creative, product, and customer experience teams to ensure consistent and on-brand messaging.

Maintain a strong understanding of compliance and best practices in
/SMS marketing (e.g., CAN-SPAM, TCPA).

Suggest and implement new technologies, tools, and tactics to stay ahead of the curve.





Qualifications:

3+ years of experience in
 and SMS marketing, ideally in eCommerce or beauty/wellness.

Expert in Klaviyo or similar marketing automation platforms.

Strong writing skills and a keen eye for visual branding and user experience.

Solid understanding of customer behavior, segmentation, and marketing psychology.

Results-oriented with a deep passion for data, testing, and optimization.

Familiarity with tools like Rebuy or product recommendation engines is a plus.

Proactive, curious, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.

Passion for skincare, wellness, and helping people feel their best.





What You’ll Help Shape:



Your role goes beyond sending campaigns—you’ll help us build smarter customer journeys by listening to our audience. You'll turn feedback into better product launches, sharper messaging, and a stronger brand voice. You’re part marketer, part strategist, part customer advocate.





Ready to Apply? Please answer the following questions:



*Job Preferences:

Are you comfortable working on graveyard shift, 40hrs/wk?

What is your current salary?

What is your expected salary (in USD, per hour)?

Are you open to working with a time tracker?

Are you able to provide a contact from your previous employer for character reference?

Are you available to start immediately?



*Marketing Experience

Years of experience do you have in end-to-end
 marketing (including writing the
)?:

Years of experience in SMS Marketing:

Years of experience in Klaviyo:

Years of experience in
 Marketing for e-commerce:

Largest annual revenue brand you’ve managed (in USD):

Biggest
 listing size:

Have you worked before with US clients?:



Additionally, please share a link to your CV and portfolio ensure it is accessible.



Due to the high volume of applications, only qualified candidates will be contacted. We appreciate your time and interest!



About Us



Ennovation Brands, the parent company of Skin Research Institute (SRI), is dedicated to creating innovative, science-backed beauty and wellness products that deliver real results. With a strong and growing customer base, our mission is to provide high-quality solutions that enhance everyday lives. At SRI, we focus on premium skincare and beauty tools, blending creativity, research, and customer insight to drive meaningful impact. We’re passionate about delivering exceptional value and building genuine connections with our audience.





Learn more:

We don’t just build dream homes and mansions— we create sanctuaries in nature where artists, athletes, and visionaries come to disconnect from the noise, recharge, and find inspiration to create what’s next.



WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS

- Starting at Php 45K+ (85K when you included our numerous benefits – Free Unemployment Insurance, Bonuses, etc.)

- 100% remote. Work from the beach, the mountains, or another city, you’re free!

- Low stress, no burnout

- Minimum of 24 days off a year. Not to escape life, but to live it on your terms

- Back Office: We handle scheduling, calendar management, organizing files, invoicing, and other admin tasks to keep things running smoothly.

title: Video Editor - Real Estate & Social Media Content
description:
We're a top real estate team based in West Covina, California, looking for a skilled video editor who can help us build and grow our brand online. This is a part-time remote position with real potential to grow into a full-time role.



You'll be editing content for Instagram Reels, YouTube videos, and property listing videos. Raw footage will be provided via iPhone/BigVU recordings. Your job is to turn that footage into polished, attention-grabbing content that builds our audience and drives leads.



**What you'll edit:**



- Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts (60 to 90 seconds)

- YouTube long-form videos (5 to 15 minutes)

- Property listing and market update videos



**What we need from you:**



- Strong sense of pacing, hooks, and storytelling for social-first content

- Captions/subtitles on every video

- Basic color grading and audio cleanup

- Proficiency in Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve

- Ability to follow brand guidelines (colors, fonts, logo placement)

- Fast turnaround, most videos needed within 24 to 48 hours of receiving footage

- Reliable internet and consistent availability during U.S. Pacific Time business hours



**What will set you apart:**



- Experience growing a YouTube or Instagram account (show us the numbers)

- Understanding of YouTube SEO, including titles, descriptions, tags, chapter markers, and thumbnails

- Ability to suggest hooks, video structure, and content angles, not just edit what's given

- Familiarity with analytics (YouTube Studio, Instagram Insights) to identify what's working



**To apply:** Send your portfolio or sample edits AND at least one example of content you've helped grow, including the platform, what you did, and the results. Applications without samples will not be reviewed.



Compensation: $600 to $650/month depending on experience. Long-term position with room to grow.

title: Remote Takeoff Estimator (Structural)
description:
We are currently looking to add to our growing team. We are a USA-based takeoff & estimating service company. This position is for remote in-house estimators/Quality Control Reps. Please read the job details and respond accordingly to our questions to be considered. Thank you!



We are looking for Immediate Hire:



Position 1: Structural Estimators like wood/Lumber package, steel framing, and metal framing





Job Details-You will be performing takeoffs and some quality control tasks



1. Full-time work available and even over time based on Performance & Quality Of Work-We can offer stable consistent work to the right person (Full Time Preferred)

2. Some training is provided but must have prior experience

3. Must have 5+ Years of experience

4. Must have an engineering or architectural degree or equal estimator experience

5. Must Speak English

6. Must have Planswift Software (No Exception, please don't apply if you don't have this software)

7. Must have good math skills

8. Must be able to work independently in a fast-paced environment

9. Must know how to use Microsoft excel

10. USA takeoff experiences a PLUS but not necessary

11. Must be a team player

12. Must be able to work daytime EST

13. Must be able to work some weekends, depending on workload

14. Must be very responsive

15. Must be reliable and available during your shift.



We have a base starting pay rate per this job post, if you prove your skills we do offer pay raises and bonuses. We also have many management positions to which you can be promoted to.



****To be considered please send the following answered questions****



1. Have you read the job description above thoroughly and can you comply with most requirements?

2. Do you have experience in Lumber Framing and Drywall? This area is particularly busy for us, so any experience would be PLUS. Please elaborate.

3. Tell us about your related experience

4. What is your area of expertise?

5. Why should we hire you?

6. Do you have a home office?

7. How is your internet Speed?

8. How many years of actual takeoff and estimating experience do you have? with US experience?

9. What is your availability and how soon can you start?

title: Growth & SEO Specialist Developer
description:
Growth & SEO Specialist Developer



Remote (Philippines)  •  Full-Time Contractor  •  USD $500–1,000/month depending on experience + 15 days PTO





About LeadTruffle



LeadTruffle is an AI-powered lead qualification and routing platform built for home services contractors (plumbers, electricians, HVAC techs, roofers, etc.). We aggregate leads from platforms like Google, Yelp, Thumbtack, and Angi into a single inbox, then use AI to qualify and route them automatically via SMS and voice. We're a fast-growing, venture-backed startup based in the US with a small, high-output team.



The Role



We're looking for a sharp, self-motivated person to own our growth and SEO efforts and handle light web development tasks. This is primarily a marketing and content role - not a software engineering position - but you'll work inside our codebase for website updates, landing pages, and content publishing. You'll report directly to the CTO and co-founder.

This is a great opportunity for someone early in their career who wants hands-on experience at a fast-growing AI startup, with real ownership over growth outcomes from day one.



What You'll Do



SEO & Content (Primary Focus: ~70% of time)



Research keywords and build content strategies targeting home services contractors

Write, edit, and publish blog posts, landing pages, and website copy optimized for search

Submit to business directories, manage backlink outreach, and monitor domain authority

Engage authentically on Reddit and other communities where contractors spend time

Track rankings, traffic, and conversions using tools like Google Search Console, Ahrefs, or Semrush

Monitor and optimize our visibility in AI search tools (ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.) — this is a growing channel for us

Draft and schedule press releases and syndicated content



Light Web Development (~30% of time)



Make website updates - copy changes, new landing pages, styling fixes, image optimization

Submit pull requests into our monorepo, following code review workflows

Implement small frontend fixes and improvements with specific guidance from the CTO

Use AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) to accelerate your work



Requirements



Strong written English - you'll be writing blog posts, website copy, and community posts daily

Reliable internet connection and availability during overlapping US business hours (at least 3-4 hours of overlap with US Eastern Time). 

Must have a good webcam for calls, and check in frequently on slack.

Basic understanding of SEO principles (on-page optimization, keyword research, link building)

Comfortable with Git and GitHub workflows (branching, pull requests, code review)

Familiar with HTML and CSS; bonus if you know JavaScript and React.

Experience using AI tools for productivity - Claude, ChatGPT, or similar. Ideally you've used Claude Code or Cursor for coding assistance

Active Reddit user or familiarity with how Reddit communities work

Self-starter who can execute on well-defined tasks independently without constant supervision





Nice to Have



CS degree or technical coursework

Experience with React, Next.js, or Tailwind CSS

Prior work in SaaS, lead generation, or home services industry

Familiarity with tools like Ahrefs, Semrush, Google Analytics, or Screaming Frog

Portfolio of writing samples or content marketing work





What We Offer



Competitive pay for the Philippines market ($500–1,000 USD/monthly salary, depending on experience)

15 Days of Paid time off / Holidays

Direct mentorship from the CTO and co-founder - you won't be buried in a large org

Real ownership and impact at a startup in a high-growth phase

Exposure to AI tools, modern development workflows, and SaaS marketing

Flexible remote work - we care about output, not hours logged





How to Apply



Simply submit your resume to this posting & fill out this screener form:


/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdn8MZonkeBJrfZEvPX5mz8QDHu_st4j8z-gYAB9Aa0NDMe7g/viewform?usp=dialog

/document/d/1colyJoaSIW18zG89gCeSLCjzeWv0HCY8



We read every application. No cover letter template needed - just be yourself.

title: Remote Takeoff Estimator/Quality Control Rep-Work From Home (STRUCTURAL)
description:

Position 1: Structural Estimators like wood/Lumber package, steel framing, and metal framing





Job Details-You will be performing takeoffs and some quality control tasks



1. Full-time work available and even over time based on Performance & Quality Of Work-We can offer stable consistent work to the right person (Full Time Preferred)

2. Some training is provided but must have prior experience

3. Must have 5+ Years of experience

4. Must have an engineering or architectural degree or equal estimator experience

5. Must Speak English

6. Must have Planswift Software (No Exception, please don't apply if you don't have this software)

13. Must be able to work some weekends, depending on workload

14. Must be very responsive

We have a base starting pay rate per this job post, if you prove your skills we do offer pay raises and bonuses. We also have many management positions to which you can be promoted to.



****To be considered please send the following answered questions****



1. Have you read the job description above thoroughly and can you comply with most requirements?

2. Do you have experience in Lumber Framing and Drywall? This area is particularly busy for us, so any experience would be PLUS. Please elaborate.

3. Tell us about your related experience

9. What is your availability and how soon can you start?

title: Appointment Setter
description:
We’re a fast-growing performance advertising startup based in Canada. We’re hiring an Appointment Setter on a long-term monthly retainer (after probation, and based on performance). You’ll support our clients by calling leads and turning them into booked appointments.



We want Setters who think like consultants, not script-readers. You’ll be working warm leads in the health and beauty service space, like Medspas, Laser Clinics, and Estheticians.



**What You’ll Do:**



- Call and qualify warm leads within 5 minutes of them coming in through our CRM

- Keep the CRM clean and organized (scheduling, notes, and pipeline management)

- Follow up with potential patients by SMS and
 to increase booking rates

- Handle objections professionally and help leads understand treatments (Botox, PRP, Laser Hair Removal, etc.)

- Work with our team to improve scripts and share feedback on lead quality

- Join daily and weekly check-in meetings



**What We’re Looking For:**



- **Flawless English communication** (spoken and written). You should sound confident, clear, and friendly on the phone, with little to no accent

- **Sales or appointment setting experience**

- **Hands-on experience** working with Medspas or selling high-ticket beauty services

- **Tech-savvy:** Comfortable in CRMs (GoHighLevel/GHL is a plus)

- **Availability:** You must work during Eastern Standard Time (EST) business hours

- **Focus:** This needs to be your main focus. No sub-contracts or agencies. You’ll work closely with our team

- **Reliability:** Quick replies in Slack and
, plus a quiet workspace and stable internet



**This is perfect for someone who:**



- Thrives in a fast-paced, high-pressure startup

- Isn’t afraid of the phone and can take rejection without getting rattled

- Wants a long-term role with room to grow and a wide range of clients



**To Apply, Please Send:**



- A short video introducing yourself and your relevant experience

- Your answer to this scenario: How would you handle a lead who says, “That’s too expensive” for a laser treatment?

- Your availability (EST)

- Salary and commission expectations (CAD)

- Your resume or CV



If you’re selected for an interview, we may ask you to complete a mock-call assessment.

title: Executive Assistant to U.S. Founder (Strategic Role) - Construction Industry)
description:
Remote – Philippines | Full-Time | 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM CST | Long-Term Growth Role



This is not a typical VA job.

You will work directly with a U.S.-based founder at a company specializing in safety systems for the construction and industrial space. This is a strategic support role — not a task list. Our current Sales Associate started in this exact seat and grew into a larger position. We promote from within.



What You'll Do

Manage and prioritize the founder's inbox. Ensure customers are acknowledged within 4 hours (goal: 1 hour). Protect the calendar from low-value meetings. Track follow-ups in HubSpot CRM. Coordinate across the team. Capture ideas and turn them into structured action steps. Run weekly planning support.

You will not wait for instructions. You will think ahead.



What We Hire For

Experience is helpful. It is not the filter.

We hire for: ownership, follow-through, responsiveness, strong written English, and the confidence to respectfully push back when priorities drift.

We can train skills. We cannot train initiative.



"Batteries Included" — What That Means Here

You close loops without reminders. You move things forward without being chased. You improve systems without being asked. You are comfortable telling the founder when something doesn't align — calmly, clearly, and without drama.

If you prefer detailed step-by-step instructions, this role will not be a fit.



6-Month Success

Inbox runs without supervision. Calendar is clean and protected. Customers are responded to consistently. Weekly planning runs without fail. The founder has fewer interruptions and more strategic focus.



Work Structure

7:00 AM – 3:00 PM CST. Major Philippine holidays respected. U.S. holidays may be catch-up days. Professional appearance required for video calls. Results matter more than clock-watching.



Growth Path

This role can expand into operations, sales coordination, or strategic management. Performance is noticed and rewarded.



To Apply

Answer all five questions. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

Describe a time you respectfully disagreed with a manager. What happened?

If you opened your inbox and saw 50 unread
s, how would you prioritize them?

If your boss kept adding new ideas mid-week, how would you handle that?

What systems do you personally use to stay organized?

What is your expected monthly salary in Philippine Pesos?



We are not looking for someone to assist. We are looking for someone who wants to grow, own their work, and build something real.

If that's you — apply.

title: Sales and Operations Specialist (Remote; $8/hour)
description:
[PLEASE PROVIDE A LINK TO A 30-60 SECOND VOICE MEMO VIA 
 SHOWING YOUR PERSONALITY AND DISCUSSING WHAT VALUE YOU WILL BRING TO OUR COMPANY - DO NOT READ A SCRIPT PLEASE]



Job Summary:



We are seeking a motivated and highly organized Sales and Operations Specialist to be the primary point of contact for our clients. This role is central to our operations, involving handling inbound leads, driving sales, managing customer billing and payments, scheduling logistics, and coordinating with our drivers and partners. The ideal candidate excels in communication, has a great attitude, is receptive to feedback, is sales-oriented yet customer-focused, learns quickly, and thrives in a remote, fast-paced environment, reporting directly to the company owners.



Working Hours & Expectations:



This is a full-time remote position requiring approximately 35-40 hours per week.

The schedule includes partial weekdays (aligning with Los Angeles/Pacific Time afternoon/evening hours) and partial days on Saturday and Sunday (aligning with business hours).

High responsiveness during working hours is critical.

Must maintain a professional remote work environment with a reliable high-speed internet connection suitable for VoIP calls.



Compensation:



Starting pay is $8.00 USD per hour after an initial 30-day evaluation period paid at $5 per hour.



Job Responsibilities:



Manage incoming customer calls and inquiries via VoIP, providing exceptional customer service.

Effectively communicate service offerings, provide quotes, and convert leads into sales.

Nurture relationships with ongoing leads, past clients, and long-term customers.

Process customer payments accurately for dumpster rentals.

Schedule dumpster deliveries and pickups efficiently.

Coordinate closely and maintain clear communication with the company driver regarding schedules and job details.

Professionally broker leads for out-of-service-area requests to partner companies.

Prepare and send invoices to partner companies who broker orders to our service.

Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, sales, payments, and scheduling using Google Suite and other designated tools.

Collaborate effectively and professionally with owners, the driver, and partner company contacts.



Job Requirements:



Language: Exceptional (Native or C1/C2 level) verbal and written English fluency is mandatory.



Experience: 0-3 years preferred in Customer Service, Sales, Dispatch, Operations Support, or similar roles. Dumpster rental experience a plus.



Skills:



Strong sales and negotiation skills with a charming, customer-centric approach.

Excellent communication, interpersonal, and rapport-building skills.

Strong organizational and scheduling/coordination skills.

Proficiency in Google Suite (Gmail, Calendar, Sheets).

Experience and comfort using VoIP phone systems.

Ability to learn new processes and information quickly.



Personal Attributes:



Highly responsive and reliable.

Positive, professional attitude with minimal ego.

Collaborative team player, able to work effectively with the driver and owners.

Open and receptive to feedback.



Technical: Stable high-speed internet connection and a quiet, professional home office environment suitable for VoIP calls.

title: Executive Assistant - AI Consulting Business Operations (20-40hrs/week)
description:
Hi



My name is Howie! Thanks so much for reading this job posting. A little about me before jumping into the role: I'm a fun, friendly 30 year old software engineer living in California. I train Jiu Jitsu most days, travel a lot, do camping/road trips, am creative in both my work and personal life, and do amateur photo/videography that I'm going to start making content with. I live an active life and it's about to get more busy as I've just launched my consulting business and it's already moving fast. The rest of this job posting is dense and overwhelming so wanted to show that I was a real person first, not some business executive.



My 

My LinkedIn: 

Business page: 



UPDATE March 5: Thanks to everyone for their applications so far! I got flooded with work so will be following up this weekend. Will try my best to respond to everyone then, thanks



ABOUT THE ROLE

---------------



I run a consulting business based in San Francisco and Miami where I provide guidance on companies' operations, build any software they may need, and connect them to any new AI tools that would make them more efficient. Clients include tech startups, accounting firms, a law firm and individuals so far, so you'll get exposure to those industries. It's been one month but already I need help as I'm being quickly referred by my existing clients. My 3 month goal is to grow this from just me to an agency with other engineers, a designer, video editor, content/marketing. I need a sharp, resourceful assistant like you to be an extension of me in my personal life and for the business.



- The 20hrs/week for me will be a mix of my personal tasks and tasks for the business. If we end up needing more hours that's no problem for me, just estimating 20hrs for now.

- You'll also have the option to work 10hrs/week for my sister and her fiance's accounting firm that they run (or if you know anyone feel free to refer them)

- Then there will be frequent opportunities for you to do work directly for our clients as needed. For instance, if the law firm has a project they need help with. This can pay $7/hr.





WHY WORK WITH ME

-----------------



You won't be doing repetitive work. This is a dynamic, high-trust position. Here's what makes this worth your time:



You'll work with the latest AI tools - I use and build AI tools for a living. I live in Silicon Valley so I'm the first to hear about any new tools, and I get to meet a lot of the people building them. You'll be using those same tools daily. I hope we can work together forever but if not you'll come out of this role with hands-on experience that you can put on your resume or use to start your own business!



You'll learn my productivity systems - I work fast and efficiently. Together we'll create systems to get things done faster than 99% of the world. I invest in making us better - if you need something to do work more efficiently it's yours. If you want to develop a skill that will help the business go for it. The skills we build together will be beneficial for any future position.



You'll gain experience across multiple industries.



There's a real growth path - The right person's responsibility and pay will grow with the company.





SCHEDULE & COMPENSATION

------------------------



Hours: 20-40 hrs/week as stated above

Availability: Mostly on your own time but some work (like calling businesses) will need to be done during Pacific Time business hours: 9AM - 5PM PST. And I'm sometimes busy with clients during those hours so if you and I need to meet then it might be done outside of those hours e.g. 8AM or 6pm PST. So flexibility is a plus.

Rate: $5-7/hr USD (based on experience). Any ad hoc work for other clients billed at $7/hr.

Growth: Compensation reviews at 3 months and 6 months





WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

---------------------



Business Tasks



- Researching and trialing new tools and services and reporting back on whether they're worth it

- Finding and vetting video editors for both business and personal content. Sourcing a designer for brand and visual identity work. Finding a front-end software engineer for project-based work. Identifying someone to help with brand strategy and content creation. A part-time junior software engineer

- Drafting and editing client
s and cold outreach in a real person's voice

- Industry research: What AI tools are being adopted in accounting? What does a mid-size law firm's tech stack look like?

- Setting up and optimizing the business profiles across platforms: Creating and optimizing profiles on Google Business Profile, LinkedIn Services, Clutch, G2, Yelp Business, and other relevant directories for consultants

- Conducting a digital presence audit - searching for the business across Google, LinkedIn, and other platforms, documenting where we rank, who appears above us, and identifying specific opportunities to improve visibility

- Seeing what other agencies do, copying them, maybe reaching out to work together or become friends

- Project manager - coordinating with me, clients and contractors

- Administration e.g. managing expenses in Quickbooks



Personal Tasks



- Managing schedules

- Making calls to US businesses on my behalf - banks, government agencies, insurance companies, service providers

-
ing companies for customer support

-
 management: cleaning up inboxes, following up on deliveries

- Sourcing things I need to buy from
 Marketplace, Amazon, eBay

- Researching and booking travel arrangements: hotels, campgrounds, events, interesting stops, scenic routes, activities, events, restaurants

- Reaching out to professional services for things like moving, printing services, etc





TOOLS

------



You do NOT need experience with most of these. Having experience is a plus. What matters most is that you can pick up new tools quickly e.g. via YouTube tutorial. That's the skill I care about. Though some of these are very useful for any work you may do so even if you don't apply I highly recommend looking into them!



- Slack - communication, task assignment

- Loom - video recording. Besides Slack we'll be communicating through video more than anything

- Claude / ChatGPT (will ask to see your chat history because there are smart ways to communicate with these. This is the best way I can see how you think)

- Zapier / Make / n8n - workflow automation (HUGE plus if you have experience here!)

- Bitwarden - password and credential management (like LastPass or 1Password)

- OpenPhone or Google Voice - US business phone number

- Linear - task management (like Jira)

- Trello - personal task management

- Wispr Flow - voice-to-text dictation

- Granola - AI meeting notes

- Google Workspace

- Canva - light design work

- Superhuman - high-speed
 management

- Notion - documentation and SOPs

- Perplexity - AI-powered research

- Claude Cowork - desktop automation agent (big plus if you have experience here)

- Tango - step-by-step guides and SOP creation

- Toggl Track - time tracking and reporting

- CRM Tools e.g. Attio





QUALIFICATIONS

---------------



First thing's first - if your application sounds like it was generated by AI, I'll ignore it. That doesn't mean don't use AI to help write it - I'm using it to help me write this posting. But I'm editing it heavily so that it has my voice. A real voice. Your work will involve the same - clients don't want to get
s that sound like AI. So your application is the first test of this.



Must-haves:



- Strong written and spoken English. Reliable internet. Quiet environment to make calls.

- Available for a 2-3 hour window during US Pacific business hours (PST)

- Day to day flexibility would be really great. You can mostly do tasks whenever best for you but I might ask for things at any point during my day - like making a cool graphic for a last minute client presentation - and it would be nice if you were available.

- Available (some) Saturdays. Since I'm busy with clients during the week, my personal tasks end up on the weekends. Can work this out - maybe Sunday and one weekday off, and if we agree to work on off days we can do so at a higher rate.

- High agency - you take initiative and ownership, solve problems before being asked

- Attention to detail - you have high standards and double-check that all instructions were followed before completing a task

- Comfort with technology and a demonstrated ability to learn new tools independently

- Experience making phone calls to US businesses on behalf of a client



Strong pluses:



- Experience with any of the Business or Personal work listed above

- Strong background in computers e.g. IT

- Any content creation background (graphics, photoshop, video editing, social media)

- Background in marketing, SEO, branding, or helping grow a business's online presence

- Strong written and spoken Spanish

- Familiarity with business administration or bookkeeping
