title: Lead Logo Designer at SiteCraftr
description:
About SiteCraftr

SiteCraftr (
) builds premium websites for service-based businesses. We are growing our creative fulfillment team and are looking for a dedicated Logo Designer who will serve as the first point of contact in our website building and graphic design pipeline. Because the logo sets the tone for every brand we touch, this role is critical to the quality of everything that follows.



What You'll Be Doing

You will be responsible for creating original logos from scratch based on client briefs, as well as redesigning and revamping existing logos that clients bring to us. Every logo you produce needs to be polished, professional, and ready for use across web and print. You will collaborate directly with our team to ensure each logo aligns with the client's brand vision before we move into the full website design process.



Who We're Looking For

This is not a general graphic design role. We are specifically looking for someone who has spent the last 3 to 5+ years focused on logo design. You eat, sleep, and breathe logos. You know typography, iconography, color theory, and brand identity inside and out — not because you dabble in it alongside other design work, but because it is your specialty.



To be considered, you must meet the following:



3 to 5+ years of dedicated, hands-on experience in logo design specifically

A strong portfolio showcasing a range of logo work (brand marks, wordmarks, combination marks, etc.)



Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator and/or other professional vector design tools

Ability to deliver multiple concept options per project and revise based on feedback

Strong communication skills and the ability to work within a team pipeline

Reliable internet connection and availability during agreed-upon working hours



Compensation

$500/month salary to start, with opportunity for growth as we scale.



How to Apply

When submitting your application, please include a link to your portfolio so we can review your logo work. Right next to your portfolio link, include the following in parentheses: (SiteCraftr is the 
). This lets us know you've read this entire job description and are serious about the position. Applications without this will not be considered.



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Medical Intake Coordinator
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and compassionate Medical Intake Coordinator to manage patient intake processes for our Hospice and Home Health services in California. This role serves as the primary point of contact for new referrals, patients, families, and referral partners, while also supporting light marketing and relationship-building efforts with existing referral sources.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Receive and process new hospice and home health referrals via phone, fax,
, and EMR systems.

2. Verify patient demographics, insurance eligibility, and medical documentation in compliance with HIPAA, Medicare, and California state regulations.

3. Coordinate and schedule initial assessments, admissions, and start-of-care visits with clinical staff.

4. Communicate clearly and compassionately with patients, families, physicians, hospitals, and referral partners.

5. Maintain accurate, complete, and confidential patient records in accordance with HIPAA privacy and security standards.

6. Track referral status, follow-ups, and outcomes to ensure timely admission or appropriate disposition.

7. Collaborate with clinical, billing, and administrative teams to ensure smooth transitions from intake to care delivery.

8. Provide updates to existing referral sources regarding patient status and admission outcomes.

9. Support minimal marketing activities such as maintaining referral lists, sending updates or materials to existing referral partners, and assisting with referral relationship management.

10. Assist with intake and referral reports as needed.



Requirements:

Previous experience in medical intake, hospice, home health, or healthcare coordination preferred.

Working knowledge of HIPAA compliance, patient confidentiality, and proper handling of PHI.

Strong verbal and written communication skills in English.

Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail.

Ability to handle sensitive situations with professionalism, discretion, and empathy.

Proficiency with EMR systems and Microsoft Office or similar platforms.

Ability to multitask and work effectively in a fast-paced healthcare environment.



Preferred Qualifications:

Experience working with California-based hospice or home health agencies.

Familiarity with insurance verification, authorizations, physician orders, and Medicare guidelines.

Formal training or hands-on experience in HIPAA compliance and healthcare documentation standards.

Background in intake coordination, customer service, or referral management.



Monthly Rate: ?20,000

Laptop or desktop computer

Webcam

title: Remote Executive Assistant & Sales Operations Specialist
description:
Social Media Operations & Executive Assistant (Full-Time, Remote)



Looking for a detail-oriented, strong writer who wants to join a fast-growing consulting firm with real opportunities for more pay, responsibility, and growth.



If you are organized, a great communicator, and take pride in your writing - this might be the perfect fit for you.



This role is split between two areas: Social media operations and executive assistant support. About half your time will be spent on each.



## What You'll Do ##

Social Media Operations:

- Comment and engage on LinkedIn, Instagram posts on behalf of our two founders (we will give you scripts, tone guides, and examples)

- Monitor and manage LinkedIn and Instagram DM inboxes for both accounts daily

- Review new connections as they come in and flag qualified leads

- Book qualified discovery calls on our calendar through LinkedIn and Instagra
ssages

Executive Assistant:

- Monitor and organize
 inboxes

- Handle general administrative tasks and keep things organized

- Help our executive team stay on top of priorities and follow-ups



## What We're Looking For ##

- Strong written English is the most important skill for this role. You will be writing as a US-based professional to business owners. Grammar, tone, and nuance matter - this is NOT copy-paste work.

- Detail-oriented and organized — this role requires daily discipline

- Reliable internet and consistent full-time availability

- Available 9am - 5pm USA working hours

- Coachable - we have specific tone of voice rules and workflows you will need to learn

- Prior LinkedIn or Instagram, VA, or executive assistant experience is a plus - we will train you regardless



## Perks ##

- Competitive hourly base rate (USD) based on experience

- 13th month pay if you stay with the company for a full year

## About Us ##



Agency Acquisitions is a consulting firm that helps marketing agency owners ($1M–$10M revenue) improve profitability. We work with agency owners across the US, Canada, UK, Australia, and Europe. We are a small, fast-moving team and the people who work with us grow fast.

ment you would leave on a post from a marketing agency owner talking about their team growing fast

 or
 or Instagram profile link. If I cannot view your profile, your application will be deleted.

 to move forward there will be a short video call and video will be required.

Win Nguyen

title: ACCOUNTING LEAD
description:
Do you love working with small businesses and helping them grow their business beyond their wildest imagination? Do you thrive in a fast-paced environment that allows you to solve financial problems (yes math) while simultaneously working with the latest and greatest SAAS applications? And did I mention you can work from the comfort of your home or in a super cool collaborative office space? Interested? Then read on.



Starting a new job can be exciting and scary at the same time. You’re going to want answers to help determine if this is the right place for you. So before we get into the nitty-gritty of the job and what it entails, here’s some insight into who we are at the core. And if you’re still excited about being on the team, then be sure to apply.



Nitram Financial Solutions embraces the idea that technology plus productivity equals profitability. We work as a team towards our mission of helping business owners thrive financially in life and in business.



We operate 100% in the cloud as technology is our friend and efficiency is our goal. We are smart, tech savvy and sociable money gals and guys who provide financial peace of mind while educating business owners on how to run an financially healthy business.  We do this buy getting to know each and every client, not just their businesses.



Our Core Values

*Know Your Numbers - We don’t gate keep; we educate.

*Trust The Process – Our systems turn productivity into profitability.

*Think Bigger - Don’t settle. Get creative and be innovative.

*Share the Wealth - Make an impact and help others grow.

*Play as a Team - Collaborate and contribute.

*It’s not rocket science - Don’t overcomplicate or second-guess. It makes sense.



Who You Are (read: Knowledge, Skills and Abilities)

*You have an Accounting degree in your back pocket. You know accounting principles and have good analytical skills.

*You have at least 7 years of experience in accounting. You are not new to this game. You have worked with small business owners of various types on a myriad of things. You know your way around an accounting software and a general ledger.

*You get all geeked out about numbers. They tell the stories and keep us balanced.

*You get all geeked out about technology. Doesn’t matter if you are #teamapple or #teamandroid you truly believe there’s an app for that! And proficiency in using QuickBooks and G Suite are a must  (other SAAS are a plus).

*You have a keen eye for detail. Whether it’s a giant “LOOK HERE” sign, you know something is way out of balance, or an itty bitty ladybug, like being off by .02 cents, you will see it. You don’t miss a thing. 

*You can play well with the others or work on your own. While you are able to focus and “get it done” you also thrive in situations where you can collaborate with others, create an action plan then divide and conquer. You also have excellent interpersonal and communication skills (both written and verbal).

*Eager to expand your abilities and skill set.  Often times things come up that require additional hands on deck. You are willing to get in where you can fit in to help out and you may learn something new along the way.

*You have strong organizational and follow-up skills. There are many deadlines for accountants to be in compliance with. You are able to stay on task and on time and ensure that deadlines are met. 

*You juggle all the things and multi-task well by taking initiative to identify outstanding tasks and see them through to completion.



How you will shine bright

*Perform all work according to applicable rules and regulations including Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP), regulatory requirements, and organization policies and procedures.

*Review client bookkeeping data managed by bookkeepers on our team in addition to maintaining your own book of business

*Ensuring accurate client monthly bookkeeping data entry using after-the-fact accounting and real-time accounting, including write-up for your own book of clients.

*Client set-up in software, including Chart of Accounts, Customers and Vendors

*Reconciles cash and credit card accounts (including Paypal).

*Receives and applies customer payments, promptly researches any discrepancies, performs reconciliations as necessary, and records deposits in a timely manner.

*Receives and applies vendor payments, promptly researches any discrepancies, performs reconciliations as necessary, and bill payment runs by check or other ACH.

*Ensure proper documentation is received and coded for job costing and expense reports, where applicable.

*Communicates account information with staff and management to ensure processing is accurate and accounts are current.

*Analyze general ledger accounts and account variances. 

*Prepare general ledger account reconciliations.

*Process payroll using third-party vendor applications.

*Use SAAS applications to aid in accurate financial record-keeping.

*Use accounting software to prepare monthly financial reports for management.

*Assist accounting manager with the ongoing maintenance of accounting and accounting control policies and procedures.

*Perform other duties as assigned.





How to apply

*When applying, include the following in your subject line "I'm your ROCKSTAR Accountant "

*When you apply use 8 apply points to apply

title: Customer Service Representative / Client Relationship Manager
description:
Job description: We are a Disability and Financial Services company based in Port Moody, BC. We offer our employees competitive compensation, bonus incentives and a fun, energetic, and high-performing workplace!



The Company: We are a Disability Tax Credit / Financial Services company based in Port Moody, BC, Canada. We offer our employees competitive compensation, bonus incentives and a fun, energetic, and high-performing work environment! Swift Disability Services assists Canadians in applying for and obtaining approval of the Disability Tax Credit. We work closely with Canadians and their medical professionals to ensure the highest chances of success in what could result in over $45,000 in payments from the CRA to deserving Canadians. We have helped Canadians collect more than $35,000,000 in tax refunds within the last 3 years!



Our mission is to make a meaningful impact on the lives of as many Canadians as possible. We have a built a reputation of unparalleled customer service, leveraging technology and automation to create a more enjoyable experience for our customers and make lives easier for our staff. At Swift, we understand that our people are our most important asset!





The Position:

We are dedicated to building a team of high-performing individuals. We are looking for individuals to join our team in the role of Client Relationship Manager. This position is similar to that of a call-center agent. We are looking for individuals who have a proven ability to go above and beyond in order to excel in their position and drive value for a business. We are looking for individuals who are reliable, can handle 100+ calls per day, and can provide exceptional customer service to our clients.



We’re looking to add multiple Client Relationship Managers (sales staff) to our team.



The position will include:

• $5 CAD per hour (dependent on experience), paid bi-weekly via Paypal

• Target Based Commission / Additional Incentives

• Extensive Training and Support

• 40 hours/week required (Mon – Fri, 8AM – 4:30PM, PST)

• Business casual dress code





Position Requirements:

• High-Volume Call Management: High-performing individual with a proven ability to exceed targets and expectations, with comfortability handling 100+ inbound/outbound calls per.

• Clear and Effective Communication: Exceptionally proficient in both written and verbal English communication to convey information clearly and effectively.

• Versatility and Proactive Mindset: Eagerness to tackle diverse tasks with a can-do attitude and a willingness to assist wherever needed. Is okay with "repetitive" work.

• Compassionate Client Support: Passion for supporting individuals in need and contributing to meaningful change in their lives.

• Self-Initiated Learning: Demonstrated ability to swiftly grasp new concepts in a multi-faceted role and self-motivate for continuous learning.

• Masterful Organization: Strong organizational skills to efficiently manage multiple tasks and responsibilities simultaneously.

• Proficiency in Administrative Tasks: Aptitude in data entry, filing, and performing tasks with a high level of accuracy.

• Meticulous Attention to Detail: Exceptional ability to maintain accuracy and precision in all tasks. In your application, please let us know your favourite summer activity – aside from getting to know you better, this will tell us if you have read the ad carefully!

• Proficiency in Office 365 Suite: Advanced understanding and utilization of Office 365 applications including Word, Excel (advanced skills), Outlook, and Sharepoint.

• Administrative Experience: Prior experience in an office/call center/sales or virual assistant role is required.

• Medical Industry Knowledge (Preferred): Experience or familiarity with medical terminology or healthcare environments is an asset.





Basic Technical Requirements:

• Effective Work Environment: Ensure a dedicated, organized, and ergonomically suitable workstation conducive to productivity and free of distractions. This includes having your own reliable laptop/desktop computer with 8GB RAM and Chrome installed.

• Hardware Capacity: Adequate space on your laptop/desktop computer to efficiently download and run various software required for the job.

• Internet Connection: Maintain a consistent and stable internet connection of at least 10MBPS, along with a backup internet option.

• Equipment: An ideal setup includes the availability of a dual monitor configuration and noise-canceling headset/headphones for an optimal working experience.





Main Responsibilities:

Reporting to the General Manager, the CRM/DTC Specialist is responsible for (1) Making outbound calls to identify individuals who meet the criteria and (2) sending and collecting completed onboarding forms required in order for us to move forward with their claim. Some of the key activities involved in this role are:



• Answering phones and making outbound calls

• Onboarding new clients based on qualification criteria

• Following up on new customer leads via phone, text, and

• Following up on e-documents sent to prospective clients

• Effectively moving clients through each step of the DTC process

• Striving to beat daily, weekly, and monthly targets





Why Should You Apply?

• You want to be part of a fast-growing and fast-paced business, with opportunities for advancement and a long-term career

• You are a high-performing individual with strong attention to detail

• You want a stable job with a competitive wage

• You want to make meaningful impact on the lives of Canadian individuals and families

• You are a positive person who wants to join a fun and friendly work environment





Job Type: Full-time

How to Apply: Attach resume and cover letter

Salary: $5 CAD per hour (dependent on experience)

Schedule: 8 hour shift

Supplemental pay types: Bonus pay

Education: Bachelor's Degree (preferred)

Experience: Administrative, minimum 1 year (required)

Experience: Medical/Health, minimum 1 year (required)

title: Power Platform Analyst
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

We are a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking a highly analytical and solution-oriented Power Platform Analyst to join our growing team. This role is perfect for someone who thrives at the intersection of business process and technical automation. You won't just be building apps; you will be architecting systems that bridge the gap between complex business requirements and high-performance digital solutions.

 

As a Power Platform Analyst, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and debugging automated workflows and data visualizations. You will work closely with stakeholders to translate their needs into scalable solutions using the Microsoft Power Platform and enterprise integration tools like Boomi. If you are a proactive problem-solver with a passion for APIs and automation, we want to meet you!

 

Key Responsibilities:

Solution Design: Translate complex business requirements into technical specifications and end-to-end solutions.

Automation & Integration: Build and maintain sophisticated workflows using Power Automate and integrate various systems via Boomi and APIs.



Data Visualization: Design and deploy insightful Power BI dashboards that drive data-informed decision-making.

System Debugging: Proactively identify, troubleshoot, and resolve issues within existing flows, apps, and integrations.

Process Optimization: Analyze current business processes and recommend automated improvements to increase efficiency.

Documentation: Maintain thorough documentation of system architectures, API mappings, and workflow logic to ensure transparency.



Technologies You’ll Work With:

- Microsoft Power Platform: Power Automate (Flow), Power BI, and Power Apps.

- Integration Tools: Boomi (AtomSphere) and Custom API Connectors.

- Data & APIs: REST/SOAP APIs, JSON, SQL, and OData.

- Cloud Ecosystem: Microsoft 365, SharePoint, and Dataverse.



What We’re Looking For:

- Proven Experience: At least 2-3 years of experience building enterprise-grade solutions within the Power Platform.

Integration Expertise: Strong understanding of APIs and experience using middleware (like Boomi) to move data between systems.

- Analytical Mindset: Ability to "deconstruct" a business problem and rebuild it as a logical, automated process.

- Debugging Skills: A systematic approach to troubleshooting complex logic and connectivity issues.

- Communication: Excellent English communication skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.



Preferred but Not Required:

- Certifications such as PL-100 (App Maker), PL-200 (Functional Consultant), or PL-400 (Developer).

- Experience with DAX, Power Query (M), or basic JavaScript/JSON.

- Familiarity with ERP or CRM integrations.



Why Join Us?

We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:

* Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

* Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

* Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

* Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?

* Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

* Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

* Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

* Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply:

If you’re ready to take your career to the next level as a Power Platform Analyst, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (2027) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.

 

*Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines.

 

This is an overnight position. The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM CST Monday to Friday.

 

We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Virtual CIO (vCIO) – Strategic IT Consultant
description:
We are seeking a strategic and business-minded Virtual CIO (vCIO) to serve as a high-level advisor for our diverse portfolio of business clients. In this role, you will act as an extension of our clients' executive teams, bridging the gap between their business goals and their technology infrastructure.

 

As a vCIO, you are not just a technical expert; you are a strategic partner. You will be responsible for developing long-term IT roadmaps, managing technology budgets, overseeing risk and compliance, and ensuring that every technical investment our clients make drives measurable business value. The ideal candidate has a deep understanding of Managed Services (MSP), excellent consultative skills, and the ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear business strategies.

 

Key Responsibilities

*Strategic IT Roadmapping & Planning

   - Conduct regular Strategic Business Reviews (SBRs) with clients to align technology with their 1–3 year business goals.

   - Develop and maintain comprehensive IT roadmaps, including hardware lifecycle management, cloud migrations, and 

     security enhancements.

   - Identify emerging technologies that can provide a competitive advantage or operational efficiency for specific client 

     verticals.

*Budgeting & Financial Management

   - Assist clients in developing and managing annual IT budgets.

   - Provide Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) analysis for new technology investments.

   - Help clients prioritize IT spending based on risk, ROI, and business impact.

*Risk, Security & Compliance

   - Oversee client security postures, ensuring alignment with frameworks like NIST, CIS, or industry-specific regulations 

     (HIPAA, PCI, SOC2).

   - Lead Disaster Recovery (DR) and Business Continuity (BC) planning and testing.

   - Act as a high-level advisor during security i
 or complex technical audits.

*Client Relationship & Account Leadership

   - Serve as the primary point of contact for executive-level stakeholders (CEOs, CFOs, Owners).

   - Monitor client satisfaction and service delivery trends, working with the technical team to ensure high standards are met.

   - Lead the technical onboarding of new high-value clients, setting the strategic foundation from day one.

*Vendor & Project Oversight

  - Assist clients in evaluating and managing third-party technology vendors (ISPs, Line-of-Business software, etc.).

  - Provide high-level oversight for major infrastructure projects to ensure they stay aligned with the strategic vision.

 

Qualifications

Required

- Experience: 7–10+ years of experience in IT leadership, senior systems engineering, or IT consulting (MSP experience is highly preferred).

- Strategic Mindset: Proven ability to develop long-term technology strategies that solve real-world business problems.

- Financial Literacy: Comfort managing budgets, performing ROI calculations, and discussing financial impact with executives.

- Communication Excellence: Exceptional ability to present to "C-Suite" executives and translate "geek-speak" into "business-speak."

- Broad Technical Knowledge: Deep understanding of Microsoft 365, Cloud Infrastructure (Azure/AWS), Networking, and Cybersecurity frameworks.

- Consultative Approach: Strong ability to influence stakeholders and lead through consensus and expertise.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

- Experience with ITIL frameworks or MSP-specific vCIO tools.

- Relevant certifications (e.g., CISSP, CISM, PMP, or advanced Microsoft/Cloud certifications).

- Previous experience in a "Fractional CIO" or "Account Lead" role within a technical service organization.

 

What Success Looks Like in This Role

- Clients view you as an indispensable member of their leadership team, not just a "vendor."

- Client IT environments are stable, secure, and proactively managed according to a documented roadmap.

- Technology spend is predictable for the client, with fewer "emergency" expenses.

- High client retention and growth through trusted, strategic recommendations.



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



*Submit your application and include the numbers (3812) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



*Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.

 and Instagram ad campaigns to drive consistent sales and growth.



You will work directly with a creative team that already produces high-quality content, allowing you to focus on what matters most — performance, testing, and scaling winning campaigns. The ideal candidate understands e-commerce advertising, is highly analytical, and knows how to turn data into profitable decisions.



About Us



Common Hero

A streetwear lifestyle brand focused on inspiration, culture, and impactful design.



Responsibilities

Manage and optimize Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns

Launch, test, and iterate multiple ad creatives

Monitor and analyze key performance metrics (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPC)

Scale successful campaigns and pause underperforming ads

Develop campaign strategies for product launches and growth

Collaborate with the creative team to align ads with brand direction

Provide clear reporting and insights on performance

Requirements

Proven experience running Meta ads for e-commerce brands (Shopify preferred)

Strong understanding of performance metrics (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPC)

Experience testing creatives and optimizing campaigns based on data

Highly organized with strong communication skills

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Preferred Qualifications

Experience working with fashion or streetwear brands

Familiarity with TikTok Ads

Understanding of UGC-style and short-form video content

Ability to suggest creative ad concepts or improvements

Application Instructions

title: Social Media Strategist – Real Estate Branding & Lead Generation
description:
We are a top-performing real estate team based in California, looking for a skilled and creative Social Media Strategist to lead our organic growth efforts. This is a part-time remote role ideal for someone who understands how to grow a brand without relying on paid ads.



Your Core Responsibilities:

 • Develop and manage a content calendar focused on organic growth strategies

 • Create engaging content ideas for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and

 • Write compelling captions, hooks, and CTAs that build community and drive engagement

 • Use tools like Canva, CapCut, Later, or Metricool for planning and creation

 • Track and report content performance weekly with actionable insights

 • Stay up to date on trends, hashtags, platform changes, and viral formats

What We’re NOT Looking For:

This is not a paid ad role. We want someone who can grow reach, engagement, and brand visibility through content strategy, trend awareness, and consistent execution—not boosting posts.



Requirements:

 • Strong English writing skills with an eye for storytelling and brand voice

 • Familiarity with US-based real estate tone and audience

 • Ability to work during partial US (PST) hours preferred

title: Social Media Content Strategist (Part-Time to Full-Time Opportunity)
description:
We are seeking a Social Media Content Strategist & Video Editor to enhance our brand’s presence across Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms while producing high-quality, engaging video content. This part-time role can potentially transition into a full-time position based on your ability to drive growth through creative strategies and content execution.



As part of your responsibilities, you will collaborate with us to strategize and edit video content we record, transforming it into compelling, polished material optimized for social media. Your role is vital in helping us grow an organic, engaged following while creating content that resonates with our audience and drives conversions.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Develop and execute a social media strategy prioritizing organic growth and audience engagement.

 • Edit and produce high-quality video content (including short-form videos, reels, and stories) from raw footage provided, ensuring content aligns with brand messaging and platform trends.

 • Post and schedule content across platforms like Instagram, TikTok, etc.

 • Monitor trends, hashtags, and algorithms to ensure content remains relevant and impactful.

 • Engage with followers through comments, direct messages, and proactive interactions to build community loyalty.

 • Analyze content performance metrics and adjust strategies for optimization.

 • Leverage client testimonials, team insights, and other media assets to create innovative and shareable content.

 • Collaborate with the team to establish a cohesive visual and tonal identity across all platforms.



Qualifications:

 • Proven experience in managing social media accounts with demonstrated audience growth and engagement results.

 • Proficiency in video editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut, or similar tools).

 • Ability to transform raw footage into engaging, polished content tailored for specific platforms.

 • Portfolio showcasing previous video editing work and social media campaigns (please provide examples with application).

 • Strong understanding of social media trends, storytelling techniques, and analytics tools.

 • Excellent communication and time management skills.

 • Creative mindset with a focus on audience needs and trends.



Work Schedule:

 • Part-time role with flexible hours.

 • Opportunity to graduate full-time based on performance, growth, and engagement metrics.



Compensation:

 • Competitive hourly rate.

 • Performance-based bonuses tied to growth milestones and lead generation.



Application Instructions:

 1. Submit your resume to 

 2. Include a portfolio showcasing:

 • Social media content you’ve created and managed.

 • Video editing examples, including transformations from raw footage to finished content.

 3. Provide at least two testimonials or case studies demonstrating your impact on social media or video production.

 4. Share a brief cover letter explaining your passion for social media growth and video editing.



If you’re ready to take on a creative role where you can make an immediate impact, grow your skillset, and be part of a dynamic team, we’d love to hear from you! Apply today and show us why you’re the perfect fit for this opportunity.

title: Video Editor – E-Commerce Health & Beauty Brands
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company selling health and beauty products across Europe and the US. Our brands operate in skincare, beauty tools, and wellness, and we run high-volume paid advertising on Meta, TikTok, and YouTube.

We're hiring 2–3 experienced Video Editors to join our creative team on a full-time basis.



What you'll be editing:



UGC-style ads for Meta & TikTok (short-form, 15–60 sec)

Video Sales Letters (VSL) and long-form advertorials

Product demo and e-commerce videos

Testimonial and social proof videos

AI avatar spokesperson videos (via HeyGen)

Reels/TikToks with captions, hooks, and motion text overlays





Requirements:



2+ years of video editing experience (e-commerce or performance marketing preferred)

Proficient in CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or Adobe Premiere Pro

Hands-on experience with the following AI tools is a MUST:



Sora (OpenAI) — AI video generation

Kling (Kuaishou) — AI video generation

Banana Nano — AI video/motion

HeyGen — AI avatar & spokesperson videos

ElevenLabs — AI voiceover & voice cloning





Able to integrate AI-generated footage and voiceovers seamlessly into ad creatives

Strong feel for pacing, hooks, and direct-response ad formats

Able to work from clear creative briefs independently

Fast turnaround — we operate at high volume

Reliable internet connection and dedicated work setup

Available during European business hours (CET timezone, flexible)



Nice to have:



Experience with After Effects or motion graphics

Background in health, beauty, or supplement brands

Familiarity with UGC ad trends on Meta/TikTok





What we offer:



Full-time position

Stable, long-term role with room to grow

Clear creative briefs and structured workflows (we use ClickUp)

Collaborative team — you'll work closely with our Creative Director

Regular feedback and performance reviews





To apply, please include:



A link to your portfolio or reel (required — applications without portfolio will not be reviewed)

2–3 examples of paid ad edits (UGC, VSL, or product video)

The editing software you use and your average turnaround time per video

Your availability and timezone

Your experience with AI tools (Sora, Kling, Banana Nano, HeyGen, ElevenLabs) — which have you used, for what type of content, and share an example if possible

title: Assistant to the CEO
description:
Looking for a sharp, organized EA to support the CEO of a growing U.S. marketing agency.

This is not a passive role. You'll be the person who catches everything that falls through the cracks — managing tasks in ClickUp, scheduling on my calendar, and crafting sales
s through HubSpot to our lead list on my behalf. You're not just organizing, you're representing me in writing. People on my team and clients will throw tasks at you. Your job is to organize them, prioritize them, and make sure nothing gets missed.



You need:



Fluent English (written and spoken)

Background in or exposure to the marketing agency world

Experience as a ghostwriter-style EA — you've written
s or communications on behalf of someone else before

Experience with ClickUp or similar PM tools

Familiarity with HubSpot — we use it for all sales outreach

Minimum 4 hours per day of EST business hours overlap

The ability to figure things out on your own — I don't have time to hold your hand. If you need constant direction this isn't the right fit.



Details:



15-20 hrs/week to start, more as we grow

$6-10/hr depending on experience

Long term if it's a good fit

Include the video link in your application. No video = no consideration.

title: INSURANCE BROKER SUPPORT - AU HOURS
description:
We are NOT looking for candidates with Life Insurance experience. We are seeking applicants with General Insurance experience across products such as business insurance, public liability, professional indemnity, cyber insurance, commercial motor, property, and similar classes.



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Hours: Full-time, Australian business hours (AEST/AEDT)

Salary: Competitive, based on experience

Contract: Full-time



About Us

We are a growing Australian insurance brokerage seeking a proactive and detail-oriented insurance broker support professional to join our team. You will work directly alongside our brokers to support day-to-day operations across new business, renewals, and client servicing.



Role Overview

This is a non-advice giving, broker support role. You will not be providing insurance advice or recommendations to clients. Your role is to support our licensed brokers with the preparation, processing, and administration of insurance work.



You will handle pre-supplied leads and existing client work across a range of general insurance classes including commercial motor, residential and commercial property, landlord insurance, business liability, professional indemnity, cyber, and plant and machinery.



Day-to-day responsibilities include:

- Preparing and processing new business quotes and submissions to insurers

- Supporting renewal reviews and re-marketing existing policies

- Gathering client information, completing proposal forms, and preparing comparison documents

- Liaising with insurers and underwriters on behalf of brokers

- Maintaining accurate records, file notes, and documentation in broking systems

- Following up on outstanding quotes, endorsements, and policy documents

- Supporting claims lodgement and tracking where required

- Ensuring compliance with Australian regulatory requirements across all client interactions



What We're Looking For

We are seeking a motivated professional with strong attention to detail, excellent communication skills, and a solid understanding of general insurance.



Required:

- Minimum 2 years' experience in general insurance (broking, underwriting, or insurer-side support)

- Strong written and verbal communication in Australian/British English - this is non-negotiable

- Understanding of Australian general insurance products, terminology, and market practices

- Comfortable working independently in a remote environment during Australian business hours

- Proficient with Microsoft Office Suite and data entry

- Ability to manage multiple priorities and meet deadlines consistently



Highly Preferred:

- Previous experience supporting Australian insurance brokers (AU broker support experience will be given strong preference)

- Hands-on experience with Steadfast Client Trading Platform (SCTP) / Steadfast Hub

- Experience with Insight broking/management system

- Familiarity with insurer portals and quoting platforms (e.g. CGU, QBE, Vero, Allianz , underwriter online portals)

- Experience across both new business and renewals workflows

- Understanding of Australian compliance requirements and duty of disclosure obligations



Bonus:

- Claims lodgement and management experience

- Experience with endorsements and mid-term adjustments



How to Apply

Applications must include:

- The text: "I have read and understood the requirements, including the strong requirement for Australian English and general insurance experience." - applications without this will not be reviewed.

- A Vocaroo voice sample (or similar) explaining why you are the best candidate for this role.

- Your CV and cover letter.



If progressed to final stage, you must provide a clear local police check and clear bankruptcy/credit report. Background checks will be completed before starting.



Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis. Only applicants who meet the requirements will be contacted.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Loan Processor & Mortgage Broker Support (Remote – Philippines)
description:
About the Role

A growing Australian mortgage brokerage looking for a highly experienced Loan Processor & Mortgage Broker Support professional to join our team remotely from the Philippines. This is a dual role, you'll handle end-to-end loan processing while also providing hands-on support to our brokers so they can focus on client relationships and writing more business. We need someone plug-and-play who can hit the ground running from day one.



Key Responsibilities



Loan Processing

- End-to-end loan processing from application through to settlement

- Preparing and lodging loan applications via Apply Online

- Ordering and reviewing valuations, gathering supporting documents, and managing compliance requirements

- Following up with lenders and third parties to keep deals moving through the pipeline

- Reviewing bank statements and financial documents

- Ensuring all files meet compliance and audit standards



Broker Support

- Running lender scenarios and policy lookups to help brokers structure deals

- Preparing client-facing documents including comparison spreadsheets, pre-approval letters, and summaries

- Managing broker diaries, client follow-ups, and task reminders

- Handling post-settlement support including retention and review workflows

- Updating CRM and broker management systems in real time

- Acting as the broker's right hand — anticipating what's needed and staying one step ahead



What We're Looking For

- Significant experience in both loan processing and mortgage broker support within the Australian market (non-negotiable — we need someone who knows the Australian lending landscape inside out)

- Expert-level proficiency with Apply Online, 
, and Quickli

- Strong understanding of Australian lender policies, credit guidelines, and the full loan lifecycle

- Experience working across multiple lenders and aggregator platforms

- Exceptional attention to detail and ability to manage a high-volume pipeline

- Strong written and verbal English communication skills

- Proactive, self-motivated, and comfortable working independently with minimal supervision

- Ability to seamlessly switch between processing tasks and broker support duties



Working Hours

Australian business hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM AEST/AEDT (adjusting for daylight saving time).



Salary

40,000 PHP + (negotiable on experience)



How to Apply

Send your application with CV to this role on OLJ

title: Acquisition Lead Manager
description:
Property Seller Solutions is hiring a driven and disciplined outbound lead manager to generate new real estate opportunities through proactive cold calling and database follow-up.



This is a revenue-generating role focused on outbound activity, lead qualification, and appointment setting. The right candidate will be comfortable making a high volume of calls, navigating rejection, and building rapport quickly over the phone.



Key Responsibilities

- Make outbound calls to new and aged lead lists

- Pre-qualify opportunities based on company criteria

- Set qualified appointments for acquisitions team

- Maintain accurate CRM documentation

- Follow structured call cadences and follow-up systems

- Assist in reactivating dormant opportunities in the database



Qualifications

- Strong verbal communication skills (solid English skills are required)

- High level of confidence on the phone

- Comfortable asking direct financial and property-related questions

- Highly organized and disciplined with follow-up

- Able to meet daily activity metrics and performance expectations

- Real estate experience is a plus but not required



Performance Expectations

- Consistent talk time and meaningful conversations

- Appointment and qualification targets tied to performance bonuses



Compensation Structure

- Base pay

- Bonuses tied to qualified appointments and deal performance

- Growth path into closing the deals you set 



This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a production-based environment and wants a clear path to higher earning potential.



As part of our hiring process, we require all candidates to complete a Predictive Index (PI) assessment before moving forward to interviews. This helps us better understand your strengths and how you might fit within our team.

title: State Integrations & Compliance Manager | Fully Remote | U.S. State Agency Integrations
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a State Integrations & Compliance Manager to lead the acquisition and management of API integrations with U.S. state agencies (DMV/BMV/DPS).

This is a high-impact role focused on unlocking access to government data systems and building scalable integrations across all states.

You will own the full integration lifecycle from identifying APIs and securing access to ensuring compliance and ongoing system reliability.



**What You’ll Do

*API Integrations & Access (Core Focus)

- Identify APIs, data feeds, and integration methods across states

- Determine access types (REST, SOAP, SFTP, portals, third-party providers)

- Contact agencies to validate access and onboarding requirements

- Build and maintain a structured database of integrations



*Integration Ownership

- Own the full lifecycle: discovery ? outreach ? application ? approval

- Secure API credentials, sandbox access, and production approvals

- Coordinate technical onboarding (IP whitelisting, credentials, etc.)



*Agency Communication

- Act as the main point of contact for state agencies

- Communicate on both operational and basic technical topics

- Drive consistent follow-ups to move integrations forward



*Compliance & Documentation

- Manage applications and compliance documentation (DPPA, security, etc.)

- Ensure all records are accurate and audit-ready

- Support audits and regulatory requirements



*What We’re Looking For

- Experience with APIs, integrations, or technical onboarding

- Strong organization and ability to manage multiple workflows

- Comfortable working with government systems or compliance processes

- Strong communication skills (technical + non-technical)

- Highly persistent and detail-oriented



*Success in This Role Looks Like

- API integrations secured and activated across multiple states

- Consistent onboarding progress with no delays

- Strong relationships with agency contacts

- Fully compliant, audit-ready documentation



*Why Join Us?

- Fully remote

- Work directly with U.S. government systems

- High-impact role in a fast-growing company

- Opportunity to build expertise in integrations + compliance

title: Experience Proposal Writer
description:
Federal Government Proposal Writer

Our Mission

We are a mission-driven organization dedicated to securing and delivering innovative solutions for federal agencies that protect, serve, and empower communities nationwide. Our work directly supports programs that improve public safety, advance technology in government, and ensure taxpayer dollars are used effectively. We believe in integrity, collaboration, and excellence—and we’re looking for a Proposal Writer who shares these values.



The Impact You'll Make

As our Federal Government Proposal Writer, you will be the voice that translates our technical expertise into compelling, compliant, and persuasive proposals. Your work will directly influence our ability to win contracts that shape critical federal initiatives—from modernizing IT systems to enhancing national security operations. You won’t just write—you’ll craft narratives that connect our solutions to the missions that matter most.



What You'll Do

Lead the development of compliant, high-quality written content for federal RFPs, RFIs, and RFQs.

Collaborate with subject matter experts, capture managers, and technical teams to gather inputs and transform them into clear, compelling narratives.

Ensure proposals meet all solicitation requirements, evaluation criteria, and federal acquisition regulations (FAR).

Edit and refine technical content for clarity, consistency, and impact.

Maintain and update a library of reusable proposal content, templates, and past performance summaries.

Manage timelines, coordinate inputs, and ensure on-time delivery of all proposal sections.

What You'll Bring

At least 3 years of experience writing and managing proposals for federal government contracts.

Strong understanding of the federal procurement process, including FAR and agency-specific guidelines.

Proven ability to translate complex technical concepts into persuasive, plain-language narratives.

Exceptional attention to detail, grammar, and compliance.

Proficiency with Microsoft Office Suite and familiarity with proposal management tools (e.g., SharePoint, Privia, or similar).

Ability to thrive in fast-paced, deadline-driven environments while maintaining quality.

Why You'll Love It Here

Work on proposals that directly support federal missions with real-world impact.

Competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package, including health, dental, and vision coverage.

Flexible work arrangements, including hybrid and remote options.

Annual professional development stipend to support certifications, training, and industry events.

A collaborative, mission-focused team that values your expertise and ideas.

We are an equal opportunity employer and celebrate diversity. All qualified applicants will receive consideration without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, or veteran status.



Join Us

If you’re ready to help us win the contracts that shape the future of federal programs, send us your resume and a brief writing sample that showcases your ability to turn technical information into a compelling story. We can’t wait to see your work in action.

title: (Simpro/Xero) Full-Time Accounts Administrator (Remote / Online Role)
description:
Location: Remote (Work From Home)

Employment Type: Full Time

Industry: Trades / HVAC & Construction Services



BM Heating & Cooling is a fast-growing HVAC company focused on strong systems, profitability, and operational excellence. We are looking for a highly organised and numbers-driven Operations & Accounts Administrator to support the financial and operational performance of the business.



This is a full-time remote position suited to someone who enjoys working with data, improving processes, and helping a business run efficiently behind the scenes.

About the Role



This role combines accounts, operational administration, and business performance tracking. You will work closely with management to monitor job profitability, manage financial data, and ensure systems remain accurate and up to date.



You will play a key role in helping the business understand:

Where money is being made

Where costs are leaking

How performance can improve

Key Responsibilities

Accounts & Financial Administration

Manage day-to-day accounts administration

Track business expenses and allocations

Assist with invoicing and reconciliation processes

Maintain accurate financial records within accounting systems

Support cash flow monitoring and reporting

Job Costing & Back Costing

Back-cost completed jobs to measure profitability

Compare estimated vs actual job costs

Identify margin issues and cost discrepancies

Assist management with pricing insights

Stock & Inventory Management

Monitor stock movement and allocations

Maintain inventory accuracy across systems

Track bulk purchases and usage

Assist with stock reporting and controls

KPI & Performance Tracking

Maintain company KPI dashboards

Track performance metrics including:

Job profitability

Labour efficiency

Gross margins

Operational performance

Prepare weekly and monthly reports

Business Operations Support

Expense tracking and analysis

Cash forecasting assistance

Monitoring hourly rate and business cost requirements

General administration and process improvement tasks



About You

We are looking for someone who is:

? Highly organised and detail-oriented

? Strong with numbers and financial data

? Analytical and process-driven

? Comfortable working remotely and independently

? Proactive — identifies problems before they grow

? Confident using business systems and spreadsheets



Required Skills & Experience

Experience in accounts administration or finance support

Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills

Experience with accounting software (Xero preferred)

Understanding of job costing or project costing (preferred)

Experience in trades, construction, or service industries highly regarded

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Simpro experience would be GREAT



What We Offer

Full-time remote role

Stable, long-term position

Work directly with business leadership

Opportunity to grow into an operations or finance management role

Supportive and systems-focused company culture

title: VA Accountant
description:

title: Process Implementation Specialist / Marketing Specialist
description:
We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Process Implementation Specialist to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for analyzing, designing, and implementing efficient business processes to enhance operational performance. The ideal candidate will possess strong analytical skills, high attention to detail, experience with process improvement methodologies, and the ability to follow directions from the President and collaborate with various stakeholders to achieve continuous improvement goals.



At ProRise Paint & Gutters, we believe there is a better way to provide residential and commercial painting & gutter services. A more valuable, less invasive way where customers are earned rather than bought, which has helped us to become the most reviewed home improvement’s company in Canada. We're passionate about our company and our values and strive to ensure homeowners are properly informed, provided options and receive nothing short of an excellent product.



Position Overview:

As the Process Implementation Specialist, you will play a pivotal role in enhancing the efficiency and effectiveness of business processes within the organization. This role involves working closely with our President to design and execute strategies, analyzing existing processes, identifying areas for improvement, designing optimized workflows, and implementing changes to drive operational excellence. This remote position offers the flexibility to work from anywhere while contributing to the success of our organization.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Design and Implement Strategies and Initiatives:

o Work closely with the President to execute strategies and initiatives.

o Develop and refine strategies to achieve organizational goals.

o Collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement process changes.

o Ensure that new processes align with organizational goals and compliance standards.



2. Analyze Current Processes:

o Conduct comprehensive assessments of existing business processes.

o Identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks, and areas for improvement.

o Gather and document detailed business requirements and process flows.



3. Facilitate Continuous Improvement:

o Monitor the performance of implemented processes to ensure they meet desired outcomes.

o Propose and execute continuous improvement initiatives based on performance data.

o Utilize data-driven approaches to measure process performance and impact.



4. Maintain Comprehensive Documentation:

o Create detailed process documentation, including workflows, standard operating procedures (SOPs), and guidelines.

o Generate reports and presentations to communicate findings and recommendations.

o Maintain accurate records of process changes and their outcomes.



5. Develop and Execute Marketing Campaigns:

o Support the planning and execution of marketing campaigns

o Manage and update contacts, lists, and campaigns in HubSpot

o Organize and maintain marketing data and workflows using Airtable

o Oversee
 marketing, lead tracking, and follow-ups

o Coordinate marketing materials, content, and outreach initiatives

o Track campaign performance and maintain organized records



Qualifications:

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Operations Management, or a related field.

• Proven experience in process optimization, process improvement, or a related role.

• Experience with HubSpot and AirTable

• High attention to detail and strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

• Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal. Minimum of C2 English Proficiency Level.

• Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and other relevant software.

• Ability to work independently, take initiative and prioritize tasks effectively.

• High level of professionalism and integrity.



How to Apply:



Kindly fill out the application form: 



Keyword: Seaborne



Non-Negotiables:

- Hours of Operations:
Pacific Standard Time, Monday to Friday

- A quiet environment to work in. Working from cafes is not allowed.

- A computer with two monitors or laptop with 2nd screen

- Headset with microphone

- Mouse and keyboard

- High speed internet connection (100Mbps+)

title: Data Engineer (Cloud & GIS Focus)
description:
We’re looking for a hands-on Data Engineer who enjoys building things end-to-end — from designing data systems to deploying and running them in production.

If you like owning your work, solving real-world data problems, and building scalable systems in the cloud, this role is for you.

You’ll help us power analytics, AI, and GIS-driven products with reliable, production-grade data infrastructure.



What You’ll Do

Build & Own Data Systems

- Turn business requirements into scalable data solutions

- Design and build clean, maintainable data pipelines (ETL/ELT)

- Develop batch and streaming workflows

- Improve performance, reliability, and monitoring

- Deploy and maintain systems in production



Cloud & Infrastructure

- Work with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and Firebase

- Containerize and deploy services using Docker

- Set up CI/CD workflows with GitHub

- Ensure systems are scalable, reliable, and cost-efficient

- Implement logging, monitoring, and data quality checks



Data & Performance

- Design and optimize PostgreSQL schemas and queries

- Implement validation, observability, and reliability checks

- Support AI and GIS-based data workflows



What We’re Looking For

Must-Have

- 2 years of experience in Data Engineering or similar role

- Strong PostgreSQL experience (schema design & performance tuning)

- Solid Python skills

- Experience with GCP

- Docker experience

- GitHub (including CI/CD workflows)

- Ability to independently deploy and maintain production systems



Nice to Have (Big Plus)

Experience with GIS / geospatial tools such as:

- Shapely

- QGIS

- GDAL

- GeoPandas

- H3

- Google Maps API



Experience working with spatial data or map-based analytics is a strong advantage.



Attach a PDF copy of your resume when you submit your application.

 communications, including sending notifications and responding to investor inquiries in a timely manner.

 Send your application along with your Resume in a PDF Format.

title: Data Engineer
description:
We are seeking a highly driven, hands-on Data Engineer to own and execute our end-to-end data architecture — from requirements definition to system design, implementation, deployment, and long-term operations.

You will build and operate scalable, production-grade data infrastructure that powers analytics, AI systems, and GIS workloads. This role requires both strong engineering fundamentals and a DevOps mindset — you will not only build systems, but deploy, monitor, and maintain them in cloud environments.



Key Responsibilities

 End-to-End Data Ownership

- Translate business and product requirements into scalable technical solutions

- Design clean, maintainable data architecture and workflows

- Implement robust ETL/ELT pipelines

- Ensure long-term maintainability, monitoring, and optimization

- Own deployment, reliability, and ongoing operations



Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps

- Architect and manage cloud infrastructure on Google Cloud Platform (GCP)

- Work with Firebase and managed services

- Containerize and deploy services using Docker

- Implement CI/CD workflows using GitHub

- Ensure high availability, scalability, and cost efficiency

- Establish logging, monitoring, and data governance standards



Data Engineering & Systems

- Build and maintain batch and streaming pipelines

- Design and optimize PostgreSQL schemas, indexing, and performance

- Implement data validation, observability, and reliability checks

- Support AI-driven and GIS-based data workflows



Must-Have Technical Skills

Hands-on production experience with:

- PostgreSQL (schema design, indexing, performance tuning)

- Python (modern dependency management, uv preferred)

- Google Cloud Platform (GCP)

- Firebase

- Docker (containerization & deployment)

- GitHub (version control, CI/CD workflows)

You must be capable of independently deploying and maintaining systems in production.



Nice to Have (Strong Plus)

Experience with GIS / Geospatial systems, such as:

- Shapely

- QGIS

- GDAL

- GeoPandas

- H3

- Google Maps API

Experience working with spatial datasets, spatial indexing, or map-based analytics is a significant advantage.



Experience Requirements

- 3–5 years of experience in Data Engineering or related roles

- Strong foundation in data systems and backend software engineering

- Experience building and operating production-grade systems

- Experience working with cloud-native architectures



Soft Skills

- Fluent in English (written and spoken)

- Clear, structured communicator

- Collaborative, low-ego, team-first mindset

- Self-driven and proactive

- Strong ownership mentality — you finish what you start

- Comfortable leveraging AI-assisted coding tools to improve productivity



Preferred Background

- Experience working in remote or distributed teams

- Startup or fast-paced environment experience

- Exposure to AI-coding



Submit your application along with your resume and portfolio link in a google drive link.

title: Senior Credit Dispute Manager (DisputeFox & GHL Expert)
description:
**Location:** Remote (Philippines)

**Shift:** 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST (Monday – Friday)





We are a fast-growing Real Estate and Loan Pre-approval firm looking for a **Growth-Minded Dispute Expert** to lead our credit restoration wing. This is not a role for a "template sender." We need a strategist who understands the "why" behind the dispute, knows how to leverage the law, and can manage high-level workflows in **DisputeFox** and **GoHighLevel**.



**IMPORTANT:** We are looking for a dedicated tea
mber. If you currently run your own credit repair business or manage multiple outside clients, please do not apply.



Key Responsibilities:



* **Advanced Dispute Strategy:** Execute "Updated Methods" (Factual, Metro2, or Administrative) beyond basic 609 letters.

* **Legal Triage:** Identify clear violations (re-insertions without notice, failure to investigate) and prepare files for referral to our **FCRA Attorney** partners.

* **Financial Problem Solving:** Resolve complex banking "blockages" including **ChexSystems** and **EWS** (Early Warning Services) to restore client banking privileges.

* **Student Loan Management:** Navigate the 2026 "RAP" (Repayment Assistance Plan) and Tiered Standard rules. Direct clients through consolidations and IDR applications to improve Debt-to-Income (DTI) ratios.

* **Strategic Communication:** Write high-impact **Goodwill Letters** when traditional disputes aren't the best path.

* **Cross-Team Collaboration:** Work daily with our Loan and Real Estate teams. You will use **GoHighLevel** to update pipelines, trigger automations, and communicate with clients.



Required Experience & Skills



* **Software Mastery:** 2+ years of hands-on experience in **DisputeFox** AND **GoHighLevel** (GHL).

* **Management Background:** Experience managing a dispute team or a high volume of files during a scaling phase.

* **English Proficiency:** Mastery of the English language is a must. You must be able to explain complex credit concepts to American clients with confidence and empathy.

* **Technical Knowledge:** * Deep understanding of the **Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA)**.

    * Knowledge of **Student Loan Consolidation** and the latest 2026 IDR/RAP guidelines.

    * Proven track record of removing ChexSystems/EWS records.

* **Growth Mindset:** You thrive in a fast-paced environment and look for ways to optimize workflows as we scale.



### **Technical Requirements**

* Reliable high-speed internet (Backup connection required).

* Noise-canceling headset and a professional, quiet home office setup.

* Must be available during **10am - 6pm EST** (no exceptions).



---



How to Apply



1. Submit your updated Resume.

2. Provide a brief summary of your experience managing a team within **DisputeFox**.

3. **The "Check":** Include a 1-minute voice recording or video explaining when you would choose a **Goodwill Letter** over a standard dispute.



---

title: YouTube Script Writer for Personal Brand ( Business, Christianity, Discipline)

title: Full Time YouTube Video Editor
description:
We are a video marketing agency seeking a talented and innovative video editor to join our team. This role offers potential full-time employment within a few weeks for the right candidate should everything go well. The ideal applicant will have a keen eye for creating engaging long-form YouTube content, with a strong portfolio that demonstrates their experience.



Important:

**You must be able to start as soon as possible and have no other contracted work.**

**You must be an individual editor and not part of another agency or have other editors that work for you.**



Responsibilities:

- Edit a variety of video content, particularly focusing on engaging long-form YouTube videos.

- Proficient use of Adobe Premiere Pro video editing software (and After Effects as a bonus.)

- Manage multiple projects efficiently and meet tight deadlines where needed.

- Keep up to date with the latest trends and techniques in video editing and sound design.

- Utilise animation capabilities to elevate the visual appeal of videos.



Requirements:

- Demonstrable experience as a video editor, highlighted by a strong portfolio featuring engaging engaging long-form content.

- Capable of executing high-quality sound design.

- Skills in photo editing and graphic design are preferred.

- Excellent attention to detail with the ability to work efficiently under pressure.

- Superior communication and collaboration skills.

- Reliable with always meeting project deadlines.

- Passionate about video editing with a continual desire to learn and adopt new techniques.

- Self-sufficient and proactive, capable of taking full ownership of projects from conception to completion.

- BONUS: Experience editing fitness related content and VSLs.



Offer:

- Ideal candidate would be keen to showcase their skills in an initial trial period, with a strong prospect of transitioning to full-time hours within a few weeks.

- Competitive salary with top rates for exceptional talent, including potential performance bonuses and holiday/public holiday entitlements.



As part of your application, please include resume, portfolio and the word 'ECC' in your initial message to demonstrate your attention to detail.



We value talent and dedication and are eager to bring someone on board full-time who can contribute significantly to our team. We're happy to pay TOP rates for TOP talent so show us your best work and let us know how you can help take our content to the next level!

title: Rockstar Bookkeeper - Immediate Opening
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented Remote Bookkeeper with Executive Assistant duties to support accounting for multiple hospitality, nightlife, and creative-industry companies.



You will work closely with the owner, CPA, and CFO, so accuracy and communication are very important.



Responsibilities



Weekly bookkeeping for multiple companies



Reconcile bank accounts, credit cards, vendor payments, and payroll



Work in Xero and QuickBooks Online



Track intercompany transactions, management fees, and project costs



Prepare monthly P&L, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow reports



Work with CPA and CFO on filings and adjustments



Join bi-weekly finance review calls



Requirements



3+ years bookkeeping experience



Strong experience with Xero + QuickBooks Online



Understanding of multi-entity / hospitality accounting



Organized, reliable, responsive, and able to meet deadlines



Fast-Track Application



Please answer one of the questions below in your
 application.



1. Automation & Software

Do you have experience with Zapier, 
, or n8n?

If yes, briefly explain what workflows you built.

receive DJ invoices



pay DJs at the end of each night

with minimal manual work?

If yes, share a short example.

main pros and cons



impact on taxes and liability

title: Operations & AI Systems Manager
description:
Part Time Long Term Opportunity



**ABOUT THE ROLE**



We are seeking a detail-oriented and tech-savvy Operational Administrator to join our growing real estate business. In this role, you'll be responsible for streamlining our operations through process automation, AI integration, and advanced CRM management. You'll be the backbone of our client relationship strategy, ensuring seamless follow-ups and efficient lead management.





**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES**



- **AI & Process Automation:** Research, implement, and manage AI tools to automate repetitive tasks and improve operational efficiency

- **CRM Management:** Oversee and optimize our customer relationship management system; ensure data integrity and accessibility

- **Lead Management:** Develop and execute lead follow-up systems; track pipeline and conversion metrics

- **Client Relations:** Manage client communications and ensure timely, professional follow-ups on all inquiries and ongoing matters

- **Administrative Support:** Handle scheduling, documentation, reporting, pulling stats and other operational tasks

- **System Optimization:** Identify bottlenecks in current processes and propose automation solutions

- **Data Management:** Maintain organized records, databases, and documentation systems

- **Coordination:** Collaborate with  tea
mbers to ensure smooth workflow



**REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS**



- 2+ years of experience in administrative, operational, or customer relationship roles

- Proficiency with CRM platforms (Salesforce, HubSpot,  Follow Up Boss or similar)

- Strong understanding of AI tools and their business applications

- Excellent organizational and time management skills

- Proficiency in Microsoft Office and Google Workspace

- Strong  communication skills

- Ability to multitask and prioritize in a fast-paced environment



**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**



- Real estate industry experience

- Experience with automation tools (Zapier, Make, or similar)

- Familiarity with , no-code automation platforms, or workflow tools like Click Up, Trello

- Experience with lead scoring and nurturing campaigns

- Basic knowledge of real estate transaction workflows

- Strong English proficiency



**HOW TO APPY**



Send your Resume

Hours and salary you are looking for

Tell me why you would be a good fit for this position

What's your favorite tool to keep organized and favorite AI Tool?

Reply "Go To Admin" in the subject line
